ripe.en: You'd be perfect in a meal!

wx78module_light.en: They give our metal friend a little extra zest, non?
wx78module_light.trans: 能给我们的金属朋友带来了一点额外的风味，不是吗？

hedgehound.trans: 然而，生活中的一些事情并不像它们看起来那么美好。

out.en: C'est dommage, its little fire has burnt out.
C'est dommage, its little fire has burnt out.

battlesong_healthgain.en: I didn't know she was such an accomplished singer!

generic.en: Something that pretty must taste good, right?
generic.trans: 长这么好看一定很好吃，对吧？

formal_blueprint.trans: 这野兽看起来会像是要去参加一个豪华的晚宴一样。

snapper.en: Please don't take any bites out of me.

glass.en: It looks quite pretty in the moonlight, non?

generic.trans: 啊，要是有时间舒服的泡个澡就好了。

mutator_moon.en: Next time, let's bake something together, non?
mutator_moon.trans: 下次我们一起来烘焙，好不好？

ice_blueprint.en: Frozen beef? I suppose I'll have to make do.
ice_blueprint.trans: 冻牛肉？看来我只好将就了。

spider_healer.en: I suppose it's good to have a healthier alternative.
spider_healer.trans: 有更健康的选项当然是好事。

friendlyfruitfly.en: This one seems to be friendly.

sleeping.en: It is having a flashback to the spider war...
sleeping.trans: 它正在梦中进行蜘蛛大战...

generic.en: Does this mean you are even more warlike than the others?
generic.trans: 你是不是比其他蜘蛛更好战？

statue.trans: 某人真是个才华卓越的雕塑家。

potato_cooked.en: Golden brown. Simplicity at its finest.

generic.en: They have quite a menu of prizes to choose from!
generic.trans: 它们的奖品菜单十分丰富！

garlic.en: Ah! The smell of fresh garlic!

moon_altar_rock_idol.en: There's something inside that wants out.

generic.trans: 它让我浑身起鸡皮疙瘩。

nolight.en: It looks like it goes down forever.

security_pulse_cage.en: This reminds me of my little oven back home.

fishsticks.en: Crunchy and golden outside, flaky and moist inside!

normal.en: I believe it's giving me the "eye".
normal.trans: 我觉得它在给我使“眼色”。

waterplant_planter.en: Where shall I start planting my sea garden?
waterplant_planter.trans: 我应该从哪里开始种植我的海上花园？

sketch.en: Oh! I could sculpt something based off this.
sketch.trans: 噢！我可以用这个来雕一个东西。

watermelon_cooked.trans: 可以加点薄荷和羊乳酪...

humanmeat.en: I suppose I can't be picky with my ingredients, but...
humanmeat.trans: 按道理不应该挑剔原材料，但这也...

cave_fern.en: How does anything grow down here?
cave_fern.trans: 怎么会有东西长在这下面？

carnivalgame_puckdrop_kit.en: I'll have it whipped up in no time at all.

healingsalve_acid.en: The worse it smells, the better it works?

eel_cooked.trans: 可以配上一些卡津香料...

dryinginrain.en: Now it is more like a rehydrating rack...
dryinginrain.trans: 现在它更像是让食物保湿的架子...

generic.en: It looks so bare... perhaps I could put some meat on it.
generic.trans: 光秃秃的……也许我该放点肉上去。

beehat.trans: 收获蜂蜜时需要穿的装备。

handpillow_steelwool.trans: 像做失败的意式脆饼一样生硬和扎人。

lunarfrog.en: I can't help but wonder how it might taste fried in butter.
lunarfrog.trans: 我不禁想知道用黄油炸后味道会如何。

spiderhole.en: I have no reason to investigate any further.
spiderhole.trans: 我没有理由继续深入调查了。

yoth_knighthat.en: A helmet for a brave knight!

yotp_food1.en: What a treat it is to be cooked for for a change!
yotp_food1.trans: 终于轮到别人给我做饭了，真好！

yotp_food2.en: Respectfully I think I may pass on this course.
yotp_food2.trans: 我必须严肃的拒绝这道菜。

slingshot_handle_silk.en: Young Walter is an artist with his slingshot.

yotp_food3.en: I'd never turn my nose up at street food.
yotp_food3.trans: 对于街边小吃，我闻都不屑闻一下。

spiderhole_rock.en: I'd prefer not to get closer.

armorsnurtleshell.trans: 穿上这个，我可以假装成蜗牛。

chesspiece_crabking.en: I'm getting a sudden craving for seafood.

kitcoon_yot.en: You're so sweet, I could just eat you up!
kitcoon_yot.trans: 你这么可爱，真的忍不住想吞你下去。

boat_rotator_kit.en: Aha! I thought my boat was missing something!
boat_rotator_kit.trans: 啊哈，我就说我的船少了件什么呢！

sculpture_bishophead.en: I think it was part of a statue.

carnivaldecor_figure_kit.en: I wonder what could be inside?

brokenhorn_follower.en: I am very sorry about your horn, mon ami.
brokenhorn_follower.trans: 我的朋友，你的角变这样我真的很抱歉。

follower.en: You're really quite a gentle soul, aren't you mon ami?
follower.trans: 你的个性真是非常温柔，不是吗，我的朋友？

brokenhorn.en: Ha! You've no shish left to kabob with!
brokenhorn.trans: 哈！你没了竹签子，烤不了串了！

generic.trans: 我的天啊，别把我穿成肉串！

unwritten.en: I'll write a nice note for the next person.
unwritten.trans: 我会为下一个人好好写段提醒。

yotc_carrat_gym_reaction_item.en: I wonder how my carrat will react to this...
yotc_carrat_gym_reaction_item.trans: 我不知道我的胡萝卜鼠会怎么反应……

steeringwheel.en: I'll steer us in the right direction!
steeringwheel.trans: 它会给我们指一个正确的方向！

turf_road.en: It's like an ingredient for the ground.
turf_road.trans: 这就像是一种给地面的调料。

mast_item.en: An important ingredient for any sailboat.

book_birds.en: I had hoped it was a poultry cookbook.
book_birds.trans: 本以为是禽类烹饪指南。

yotc_carrat_scale_item.en: I hope I get a high rating.
yotc_carrat_scale_item.trans: 我希望能拿一个好的评级。

record_main.en: What a sweet sound it makes.
record_main.trans: 它发出的声音多么甜美。

barnacle.en: Ah, I've rarely had an opportunity to cook with these!
barnacle.trans: 啊，我很少有机会用这些东西做饭！

staffcoldlight.en: I appreciate it on sweltering afternoons.

polishcookie.en: A rich pastry with a sweet fruity filling.

megaflare.en: I seem to be developing a taste for danger.
megaflare.trans: 我似乎正在培养一种对危险的品味。

oceanfishingbobber_crow.en: Feathers are surprisingly useful for fishing!
oceanfishingbobber_crow.trans: 羽毛用来钓鱼真是出奇的好用！

pocketwatch_portal_exit.en: I wonder who might be coming through?
pocketwatch_portal_exit.trans: 不知道里头会出来谁呢？

mask_mirrorhat.en: Is it time for a masquerade?
mask_mirrorhat.trans: 到了假面舞会的时间吗？

merm_tool.en: The right tool for any job, non?
merm_tool.trans: 十分百搭的工具，不是吗？

slurper_pelt.en: Wear this? What in heavens for?

turf_mosaic_blue.en: It's like an ingredient for the ground.
turf_mosaic_blue.trans: 这就像是一种给地面的调料。

footballhat.en: Made from pork, to protect my melon.
footballhat.trans: 猪皮做的帽子，用来保护我的脑袋。

burning.en: That is not the way to cook en flambé!
burning.trans: 这不是烹调火锅的方法!

has_item_light.en: It may not be substantial in size, but I'm sure it's still substantial in flavor!
has_item_light.trans: 它的体积可能不大，但我相信它的味道还是很可观的!

teleportato_crank.en: Definitely for a cranking action of some kind.
teleportato_crank.trans: 显然是用来完成某种转动动作的。

tillweedsalve.en: Those weeds turned out to be a useful ingredient after all.
tillweedsalve.trans: 那些杂草原来还是一种有用的食材。

hermitcrabtea_petals.en: Perfect for soothing un petit madness.
hermitcrabtea_petals.trans: 能够完美地抚慰小型发癫。

picked.en: She needs time to regrow, non?
picked.trans: 她需要时间重新成长，对吧？

shovel.trans: 我不是擅长庭园设计的人。

multiplayer_portal_moonrock.en: It seems dangerous, but it's oddly calming.
multiplayer_portal_moonrock.trans: 好像很危险，但却惊人的让人平静。

chesspiece_manrabbit.en: As far as battles go, it was probably the most pleasant.
chesspiece_manrabbit.trans: 这应该是最愉快的一次战斗。

pomegranate_oversized.en: I could make a fine dessert with you!
pomegranate_oversized.trans: 我可以把你做成精致的甜点！

woodcarvedhat.en: Ah, I can see it's been carved with love and care.
woodcarvedhat.trans: 啊，我看得出来它是用爱和关怀雕刻出来的。

carnivaldecor_eggride_kit.en: I'll have it whipped up in no time at all.
carnivaldecor_eggride_kit.trans: 我三下五除二就能给它做好。

houndstooth_blowpipe.en: Les dents will make a dent!

brush.trans: 用来整理乱糟糟的兽毛。

short.en: A hatching is in the offing!

cold.en: Oh, you poor egg, you are so cold!
cold.trans: 噢，你这颗可怜的蛋，冻到了吧！

long.en: This is going to take some dedication.
long.trans: 这种事需要投入点时间。

spoiled_food.en: It is a sin to waste food...

burning.en: It, oh, it appears to be on fire.

moonrocknugget.en: A little piece of sky to hold in my hand.
moonrocknugget.trans: 握在手里的一小块蓝天。

skeleton_notplayer.en: I've made soup with worse things.
skeleton_notplayer.trans: 比这糟糕的东西我都煲成过汤。

boat_bumper_shell.en: I've given my boat a crunchy outer shell.
boat_bumper_shell.trans: 我给船做了个酥脆的外壳。

drumstick_cooked.en: Could use a light honey garlic glaze...
drumstick_cooked.trans: 可以加点淡味的蜜汁香蒜酱...

chesspiece_moon.en: Hits my eye like a big pizza pie.
chesspiece_moon.trans: 像一块披萨一样让我眼前一亮。

pepper.en: Finally, I can make my famous hot sauce!
pepper.trans: 终于，我能做我著名的辣酱了！

slingshotammo_moonglass.en: This looks like a key ingredient for a slingshot.
slingshotammo_moonglass.trans: 这看起来像是弹弓的关键组件。

tillweed.en: I'm afraid you're bothering the other plants, mon ami.
tillweed.trans: 恐怕你打扰到其他植物了，我的朋友。

furtuft.en: Plush and soft, if a bit dirty.
furtuft.trans: 软软的，绒绒的，虽然有点脏。

polly_rogers.en: Je m'excuse, I did not bring any crackers.

construction1.en: Some kind of platter for the ground?
construction1.trans: 这是地上用餐摆的盘子么？

construction2.en: Only a few more ingredients left.

generic.en: Ah, some kind of light fixture perhaps?
generic.trans: 啊，这是某种灯光装置吧？

chesspiece_beequeen.en: Muse for my new honey glaze!

generic.en: Let's see where this takes us, non?
generic.trans: 来看看它会通往哪里吧，好不好？

batnosehat.en: Quelle horreur! What a waste of good food!
batnosehat.trans: 真是可怕！太糟蹋粮食了！

saddle_race.en: Adds a little spice to my ride.
saddle_race.trans: 让我出门时增添一些香气。

trident.en: What dish could accomodate a fork of that size?
trident.trans: 什么样的料理才用得到这样大的叉子？

book_gardening.en: Maybe Mme. Wickerbottom would be interested in starting a herb garden.
book_gardening.trans: 也许啊，薇克巴顿有兴趣为我种一些烹调用的香草。

gingerbreadhouse.en: The piping on those roofs - magnifique!
gingerbreadhouse.trans: 屋顶上的管道简直棒极了！

barnaclestuffedfishhead.en: Some culinary experiments go better than others.
barnaclestuffedfishhead.trans: 有些烹饪实验比其他实验更顺利。

turf_beard_rug.en: Mon dieu, how long must that have taken to make?
turf_beard_rug.trans: 我的天啊，这得是花了多长时间才做出来的啊？

merm_toolshed.en: What have they cooked up in there?
merm_toolshed.trans: 他们在里面做了道什么大菜？

spice_garlic.en: Without garlic powder, life is not worth living.
spice_garlic.trans: 没有蒜粉，生活根本不值得。

generic.en: You know how to get me home to maman?
generic.trans: 你知道怎么送我回到故乡妈妈的身边吗？

shadow_forge_kit.en: I'll just put these pieces together, and voilà!
shadow_forge_kit.trans: 我只需要把这些都组合到一起，然后就哇啦！

monkeypillar.en: They're tall enough to skewer the clouds!
monkeypillar.trans: 这些柱子高到可以把云彩都串起来！

cactus_meat_cooked.en: Could use some tortillas and melted queso...
cactus_meat_cooked.trans: 可以配上一些玉米饼和融化的奶酪...

yotb_pattern_fragment_1.en: One part of a recipe for a beefalo costume.
yotb_pattern_fragment_1.trans: 皮弗娄牛礼服的部分配方。

yotb_pattern_fragment_2.en: One part of a recipe for a beefalo costume.
yotb_pattern_fragment_2.trans: 皮弗娄牛礼服的部分配方。

yotb_pattern_fragment_3.en: One part of a recipe for a beefalo costume.
yotb_pattern_fragment_3.trans: 皮弗娄牛礼服的部分配方。

wx78_moduleremover.en: Ah, I believe this utensil belongs to our metal friend.
wx78_moduleremover.trans: 啊，这个器皿属于我们的金属朋友。

weed_ivy.en: What are you doing in my lovely garden?
weed_ivy.trans: 你在我可爱的花园里做什么？

inactive.en: Do not lick it. Your tongue will get stuck.
inactive.trans: 别舔它。你的舌头会被粘住的。

handpillow_kelp.en: Wet and unpleasant, like an old spinach salad.
handpillow_kelp.trans: 湿漉漉、令人不悦，就像一盘放久了的蔬菜沙拉。

trap.en: I do not wish to be so tricky, but the dinner bell calls me.
trap.trans: 我不想使诡计，但开饭的铃声在召唤我。

ghostlyelixir_shield.en: I'm not sure about some of those ingredients, mademoiselle.
ghostlyelixir_shield.trans: 我对有些配方不是很有信心，小姐。

mosquitobomb.en: So fresh, they are still squirming.
mosquitobomb.trans: 真新鲜，它们还在蠕动着。

generic.en: There's simply no reason for it to be that big.

yotc_carrat_gym_stamina_item.en: I'd better begin training my carrat!
yotc_carrat_gym_stamina_item.trans: 我最好早点开始训练我的胡萝卜鼠！

broken.en: I'm afraid the switch is broken.

twigs.en: The start of a good cooking fire.
twigs.trans: 用来生火做饭的好材料。

nightlight.en: And I thought fluorescent tubes were a bad invention!
nightlight.trans: 我认为荧光灯管是个糟糕的发明！

corn_seeds.en: Future ingredients, just waiting to be grown!
corn_seeds.trans: 未来的食材，就等着你来种!

yotb.en: Perhaps I should show it to the judge, to get a measure of his taste.
yotb.trans: 也许我该把它拿给评委看看，了解一下他的品位。

cactus_meat.en: I hope it does not prickle going down.
cactus_meat.trans: 我希望它不要扎到我的手。

slingshotammo_gelblob.en: This looks like a key ingredient for a slingshot.
slingshotammo_gelblob.trans: 这看起来像是弹弓的关键组件。

featherhat.en: What am I supposed to do with this?
featherhat.trans: 这个东西可以用来做什么？

balloonvest.en: I'm not sure how safe that is.
balloonvest.trans: 我不知道那个能有多安全。

pocketwatch_dismantler.en: Oh, Mme. Wanda left her tools!
pocketwatch_dismantler.trans: 噢，夫人。旺达忘记带她的工具了！

line_1.en: A picture of lots of unprepared seafood. I'm hungry.
line_1.trans: 一副画满生猛海鲜的画。我饿了。

line_5.en: The prawns have ascended into deliciousness.

line_3.en: The world is flooded by a finely fermented black bean sauce.
line_3.trans: 一种精致发酵的黑豆酱淹没了这个世界。

charging.trans: 我觉得它要充能完毕了。

destabilizing.trans: 不安全的事情正在发生。

off.en: All the pieces are back in place.

burning.en: Soon it won't be good for much.
burning.trans: 很快它的处境就会堪忧。

generic.en: An important aspect of my art.

spider_repellent.en: Unfortunately, it seems only spiders can shoo other spiders.
spider_repellent.trans: 不幸的是，似乎只有蜘蛛才能驱赶其他蜘蛛。

held.en: Let me lend you my warmth, feathered friend.
held.trans: 长羽毛的朋友，让我给你一点温暖。

generic.en: This little fellow seems quite frigid.

chesspiece_bearger_mutated.en: A second course of monster that I didn't ask for!
chesspiece_bearger_mutated.trans: 我没要的第二道怪物主菜！

carnival_vest_c.en: When at a crow carnival, dress like the crows do, non?
carnival_vest_c.trans: 在乌鸦嘉年华上，要像乌鸦那样穿衣服，不是吗？

carnival_vest_b.en: It provides a nice bit of shade.
carnival_vest_b.trans: 它提供了一个很好的阴凉之处。

waxpaper.en: Wax paper! Always useful in the kitchen.
waxpaper.trans: 蜡纸耶！在厨房总会有用的。

merm_lunar.en: The merms have been looking a little... different lately.
merm_lunar.trans: 鱼人们最近看起来有点……不一样。

emberlight.trans: 薇洛把灶台丢下不管了。

growing.en: The sea is capable of amazing things.

book_bees.en: I'm more interested in honey than the bees.
book_bees.trans: 我对蜂蜜比对蜜蜂更感兴趣。

revealed.en: Bonjour, Monsieur Boeuf! What do you have?
revealed.trans: 你好啊，牛先生！你有什么好东西？

generic.en: Hmm. I wouldn't eat that one.

gazpacho.en: Ah. Perfect on a hot day.

turf_mud.en: It's like an ingredient for the ground.
turf_mud.trans: 这就像是一种给地面的调料。

turf_monkey_ground.en: It's like an ingredient for the ground.
turf_monkey_ground.trans: 这就像是一种给地面的调料。

archive_lockbox.en: Perhaps it contains an ancient recipe of some kind.
archive_lockbox.trans: 它里面也许有古代的食谱。

carnival_vest_a.en: Ah, I remember this style being quite popular in Paris.
carnival_vest_a.trans: 我记得很清楚，这个款式当年风靡整个巴黎。

firestarter.en: Le singe...

ghost.en: That monkey has looked better.
ghost.trans: 那只猴子以前脸色没这么差。

murderer.en: Mon dieu! The monkey is on a rampage!
murderer.trans: 我的天啊！那猴子大开杀戒！

attacker.en: Perhaps it's not so friendly after all...

reviver.en: Thank you for your help, mon... key.
reviver.trans: 谢谢你的帮助，我的……猴子。

generic.trans: 啊，这个看着还比较友善。

wx78module_maxhealth.en: They give our metal friend a little extra zest, non?
wx78module_maxhealth.trans: 能给我们的金属朋友带来了一点额外的风味，不是吗？

turf_ruinstiles.en: It's like an ingredient for the ground.
turf_ruinstiles.trans: 这就像是一种给地面的调料。

wagstaff_mutations_note.en: Zut alors! I thought it would be a recipe!

mask_queenhat.en: Is it time for a masquerade?
mask_queenhat.trans: 到了假面舞会的时间吗？

ancientfruit_nightvision_cooked.en: Better, but now it's missing that certain je ne sais quoi.
ancientfruit_nightvision_cooked.trans: 好些了，但又缺少了那种无以名状的特质。

yotb_post_item.en: This looks like a good spot, non?
yotb_post_item.trans: 这里看起来是个好地点，不是吗？

book_brimstone.en: I don't think that's my forte.

slurtle_shellpieces.en: If only I had crazy glue.
slurtle_shellpieces.trans: 要是我有疯狂快干胶就好了。

fused_shadeling.trans: 它看起来一点都不友好！

glassed.en: Mon dieu, the water has turned to glass!
glassed.trans: 我的天啊，水已经变成了玻璃！

cave.en: It doesn't seem very useful down here.

generic.en: I hope the birds get to enjoy it, too.

archive_security_pulse.en: C'est beau! I wonder where it's going?
archive_security_pulse.trans: 真漂亮！我想知道它要去哪里？

generic.en: Fresh spices! Oh, how I have missed you!
generic.trans: 新鲜的香料！太怀念你们了！

thulecite.en: Thule-... thulec-... it rolls off the tongue, does it not?
thulecite.trans: 丢...铥...这词可真绕口，不是吗？

burning.en: It burns like any other bush.
burning.trans: 它像其他灌木一样烧着了。

picked.en: Not sure I want to do that again.
picked.trans: 不确定我是不是还想再采一次。

succulent_potted.en: I would have preferred to cook it, but c'est la vie.
succulent_potted.trans: 我本想做熟吃的，但这就是生活。

dug_sapling.en: Should I bring it back to life?
dug_sapling.trans: 我应该让它再活一次吗？

burnt.en: A good night's sleep, up in smoke.

boat_grass_item.en: It won't go far, but we must start somewhere, non?
boat_grass_item.trans: 虽然它走不远，但不积跬步无以至千里，不是吗？

moonglassaxe.en: This will cut my work time in half!
moonglassaxe.trans: 可以让我的工作时间砍半了！

bodypillow_petals.en: Light and airy, like a soufflé.
bodypillow_petals.trans: 像蛋奶酥一样轻盈透气。

boards.en: Sigh. It would be so perfect for grilling salmon.
boards.trans: 哎。它用来烤鲑鱼再好不过了。

giftwrap.en: I could hide some cookies inside for the little ones.
giftwrap.trans: 我可以为小朋友们藏一点饼干。

feather_robin_winter.en: A bird's feather, in tuna blue.
feather_robin_winter.trans: 一根鸟羽，有着金枪鱼的蓝色。

carnivaldecor_plant_kit.en: I'll have it whipped up in no time at all.
carnivaldecor_plant_kit.trans: 我三下五除二就能给它做好。

moon_cap_cooked.en: Hm. It has quite the... interesting aroma.

mermarmorupgradedhat.en: It is not a fit for me.

slingshot_frame_wagpunk_0.en: Young Walter is an artist with his slingshot.
slingshot_frame_wagpunk_0.trans: 小沃尔特是一位弹弓艺术家。

barnacle_cooked.en: I think we can do a bit better than that!
barnacle_cooked.trans: 我想我们可以做得更好一些!

klaus_sack.en: There might be all sorts of treats inside.
klaus_sack.trans: 里面可能有很多好吃的。

picked.en: Empty nest syndrome is setting in.

milkywhites.en: Though it doesn't look too appealing now, it may be a useful substitute for other ingredients.
milkywhites.trans: 虽然它现在平平无奇，但也许能用来替代别的原料。

eyemaskhat.en: I must remember to avoid cutting onions while wearing this.
eyemaskhat.trans: 我得留意戴这个时不能切洋葱。

wx78module_bee.en: They give our metal friend a little extra zest, non?
wx78module_bee.trans: 能给我们的金属朋友带来了一点额外的风味，不是吗？

wall_wood_item.en: Delivers a rather wooden performance as a wall.
wall_wood_item.trans: 可以修成一堵相当呆板的木墙。

turf_fungus.en: It's like an ingredient for the ground.
turf_fungus.trans: 这就像是一种给地面的调料。

meat.en: I must remember to cut across the grain.
meat.trans: 我必须记得逆着肉纹切。

generic.en: This tree's spent too much time at sea.
generic.trans: 这棵树在海上待的时间太旧了。

mask_dollbrokenhat.en: Is it time for a masquerade?
mask_dollbrokenhat.trans: 到了假面舞会的时间吗？

yots_worm.en: Look out for that most exquisite worm!
yots_worm.trans: 小心那条最精致的蠕虫！

honeynuggets.en: Junk food is my guilty pleasure. Shh!
honeynuggets.trans: 吃垃圾食品让我有罪恶的愉悦感。嘘！

desiccantboosted.en: It keeps me drier than hardtack.
desiccantboosted.trans: 它让我比压缩饼干还干爽。

staff_lunarplant.en: I could stir up some real trouble with this.
staff_lunarplant.trans: 要是想捣乱，用这个准没错。

messagebottle.en: I do hope that's a recipe inside!

firestarter.en: %s started quite the fire recently.

ghost.en: Let's fix you up, alright?
ghost.trans: 咱们把你修好，好不好？

murderer.en: She's done a truly awful thing.
murderer.trans: 她干了件大坏事。

attacker.en: You've been much too rough lately, %s.
attacker.trans: 你最近有些过于粗鲁了，%s。

reviver.en: I admire %s's sense of duty.

charlie_npc.en: Mon dieu... Is that the face I've seen peering from the shadows?
charlie_npc.trans: 我的天啊……是我之前见过的从暗影中窥视的那张脸吗？

yotc_carrat_gym_direction_item.en: I should find a good place to put this.
yotc_carrat_gym_direction_item.trans: 我们找个好地方放它吧。

record.en: Now where have I heard that before?

follower.en: I do have a magnetic presence, do I not?
follower.trans: 我就像一块磁铁，难道不是吗？

guard.trans: 好吧好吧，继续列队前进。

werepig.trans: 它发疯了，真是糟蹋了一块好肉。

dead.en: He wouldn't want himself to go to waste, would he?
dead.trans: 他是不希望自己被浪费掉的，不是吗？

generic.en: Who bred you to walk upright like that? Deuced unsettling...
generic.trans: 谁教你们这样直立行走的？害得我心绪不宁...

burnt.trans: 嗯，闻起来像是油炸蘑菇。

on.en: I like a nice pale blue, personally.

ready.en: How do I turn it on?

shroombait.en: Not the stuffed champignon I had in mind.
shroombait.trans: 这可不是我脑海中的酿双孢菇。

wilted.en: I hope Maman Angeline is eating well without me.
wilted.trans: 虽然我不在身边，但是希望安吉丽娜妈妈好吃好喝。

freshlight.en: Now we can all shine a little brighter.
freshlight.trans: 现在我们都可以发光发亮了。

burnt.en: Should have taken it out of the oven sooner.
burnt.trans: 应该早点从炉子里拿出来的。

generic.trans: 我怀念精美的餐桌布置。

empty.en: It could use a little something.

beequeenhivegrown.en: That's almost definitely bigger than before.

boat_bumper_kelp_kit.en: I will feel a bit safer with an extra layer wrapped around my boat.
boat_bumper_kelp_kit.trans: 在船上多裹一层，我会觉得更安全一些。

beargerfur_sack.en: This will keep my ingredients fresh.
beargerfur_sack.trans: 这将使我的食材保持新鲜。

papyrus.en: I could write down my recipes on this.
papyrus.trans: 我可以在上面写下我的菜谱。

chesspiece_dragonfly.en: I was afraid I was going to be broiled alive!

lavae_tooth.en: It came off my petite fiery friend.
lavae_tooth.trans: 我小火辣朋友身上掉下来的。

moon_altar_idol.en: Oui, I'll take you back where you belong.
moon_altar_idol.trans: 不错，我要把你放回原处。

gestalt_guard_evolved.en: I assure you it wasn't personal.
gestalt_guard_evolved.trans: 我向你保证当初不是私人恩怨。

mask_kinghat.en: Is it time for a masquerade?
mask_kinghat.trans: 到了假面舞会的时间吗？

dug_trap_starfish.trans: 哈！我不是任何人的零食！

cold.en: Are you chilly, ma petite choux-fleur?

crabking_mob_knight.en: Wow. It's not even the main course.

deflated.en: Quite an odd design. Then again, it was made by an odd fellow.
deflated.trans: 很奇怪的设计。不过毕竟是一个奇怪的家伙做的。

some_kelp.en: Feast, my fishy friends! Plenty more where that came from.
some_kelp.trans: 大快朵颐吧，我的鱼朋友们！这道菜的量管够。

generic.en: Nothing sadder than an empty dish!
generic.trans: 光有餐具不上菜是最让人悲伤的！

lavae_cocoon.en: Yuck. I should wash my hands before I prepare food.

froglegs_cooked.en: Could use garlic and clarified butter...
froglegs_cooked.trans: 可以加点大蒜和无水黄油...

dug_berrybush_juicy.en: Now I can have fresh berries wherever I please!
dug_berrybush_juicy.trans: 这下我随时都能吃到新鲜的浆果了！

burning.en: I never burn anything in the kitchen.
burning.trans: 我从没在厨房里烧着过任何东西。

diseasing.en: It's starting to look a little funny.

generic.en: A common ingredient for success around here.
generic.trans: 在这里生存下去需要的常见材料。

barren.en: Could I get some fertilizer over here?
barren.trans: 也许我可以往上面浇点肥料？

carnival_plaza_kit.en: This tree has a certain je ne sais quoi.
carnival_plaza_kit.trans: 这棵树有种无以名状的特质。

wurt_swampitem_lunar.en: There's something brewing in the mind of our little friend.
wurt_swampitem_lunar.trans: 我们的小朋友思想里正在酝酿着一些东西。

dead.trans: 至少它现在已经完结了。

generic.en: Perhaps the garden might like a little drink, non?
generic.trans: 也许园子想喝点儿了，不是吗？

generic.en: I do feel a bit safer now.
generic.trans: 我现在感觉安全一点了。

body.en: That will not fit in any pot.
body.trans: 那东西塞不进任何的锅子。

monkey_smallhat.en: It makes me look like a seasoned seafarer, non?
monkey_smallhat.trans: 这让我看起来像一个经验丰富的海员，不是吗？

boat_leak.en: I should do something about that.

wormhole_limited.trans: 这东西还可以看起来更恶心吗？

dustmothden.en: Quelle surprise! It's so clean you could eat off it!
dustmothden.trans: 惊喜啊！竟然如此干净，可以直接在上面吃东西了！

eggplant_seeds.en: Future ingredients, just waiting to be grown!
eggplant_seeds.trans: 未来的食材，就等着你来种!

winterhat.en: I know when to don this, and not a minute sooner.
winterhat.trans: 我知道什么时候戴上它，早一分钟都不行。

generic.en: The sight of it turns my stomach.

marsh_plant.en: I wonder if it is edible.

lichen.en: Really scraping the barrel for produce here.
lichen.trans: 它们长在这里也是不得已的。

talleggs.en: Crispy on the outside, with a nice runny center.

boatrace_seastack_monkey_throwable_deplo.en: Where to put it... I wouldn't want anyone to run into it!
boatrace_seastack_monkey_throwable_deplo.trans: 放哪好呢……我可不想让别人碰到它！

fishingrod.en: I believe I prefer the fish market.
fishingrod.trans: 我觉得自己更喜欢去海鲜市场买现成的。

book_tentacles.en: I don't see any recipes in this at all.

boatpatch_kelp.en: That should hold us over for now.
boatpatch_kelp.trans: 这应该能让我们暂时度过难关。

generic.en: I feel as though it's staring at me.
generic.trans: 我觉得好像它在盯着我。

burnt.en: Ah, I almost feel bad for it now.
burnt.trans: 啊，我现在几乎为它感到难过了。

flower_withered.en: I only use fresh ingredients in my cooking.
flower_withered.trans: 我的料理只用新鲜食材。

lowpower.en: It's getting a bit low, Winona.

burning.en: It, oh, it appears to be on fire.

diseased.en: Would some nice soup make you feel better?
diseased.trans: 喝点鲜美的汤羹会不会让你好点呢？

generic.en: Mon dieu, what happened to it?!
generic.trans: 我的天啊！它究竟经历了什么？！

turf_fungus_moon.en: It's like an ingredient for the ground.
turf_fungus_moon.trans: 这就像是一种给地面的调料。

shieldofterror.en: Mon dieu, it seems I have another mouth to feed...
shieldofterror.trans: 我的天啊，看来还有另一张要喂饱的嘴。

beefalowool.en: The beast's loss is my gain.
beefalowool.trans: 那头动物失去的就是我得到的。

turf_checkerfloor.en: It's like an ingredient for the ground.
turf_checkerfloor.trans: 这就像是一种给地面的调料。

wx78module_cold.en: They give our metal friend a little extra zest, non?
wx78module_cold.trans: 能给我们的金属朋友带来了一点额外的风味，不是吗？

yellowstaff.en: I could stir a huge pot with this thing!
yellowstaff.trans: 我可以用这东西来搅动一个大锅！

stash_map.en: Ah, it looks like this will lead me to some treasure!
stash_map.trans: 啊，看来它将带我找到宝藏！

line_1.en: I'm afraid its meaning is lost on me.
line_1.trans: 恐怕我不明白它的含义。

line_2.en: So many secrets lost to time.
line_2.trans: 很多秘密都被时间遗忘了。

line_5.en: I'm afraid its meaning is lost on me.
line_5.trans: 恐怕我不明白它的含义。

line_3.en: I'm afraid its meaning is lost on me.
line_3.trans: 恐怕我不明白它的含义。

line_4.en: So many secrets lost to time.
line_4.trans: 很多秘密都被时间遗忘了。

pig_coin.en: The best tip I have ever received.

burnt.en: Did I leave the oven on?

playing_hideandseek.en: I don't think they're hiding in there.
playing_hideandseek.trans: 我觉得他们没藏在里面。

playing_hideandseek_time_almost_up.en: My time is almost up, where could they be?
playing_hideandseek_time_almost_up.trans: 我的时间快到了，它们会在哪里呢？

oceanfishableflotsam.en: Ah, I was hoping for something more delicious.
oceanfishableflotsam.trans: 啊，我本来想钓条更美味的鱼。

bunnystew.en: Ah, lapin a la cocotte. A classic.
bunnystew.trans: 啊，无水炖兔肉，经典菜啊。

carnival_crowkid.en: Bonjour! And who might you be, little one?

oceantreenut.en: I don't think that will fit in my pocket...
oceantreenut.trans: 我的口袋应该装不下那个……

kitcoondecor2_kit.en: Now, to put the ingredients together.
kitcoondecor2_kit.trans: 这些原料在一起可以做出新的东西。

turf_ruinstrim.en: It's like an ingredient for the ground.
turf_ruinstrim.trans: 这就像是一种给地面的调料。

moonbutterflywings.en: I can make something tasty with these.
moonbutterflywings.trans: 这些可以做出来好吃的。

gelblob_bottle.en: I would not spread that on any toast.
gelblob_bottle.trans: 我不会把它涂在任何吐司上。

generic.en: I wonder what delights it will produce.
generic.trans: 我想知道它会带来怎样的乐趣。

empty.en: Like a barbeque, it requires charcoal.
empty.trans: 它跟烧烤一样，需要木炭。

dead.en: At last, it's finished. Or is it...
dead.trans: 它总算玩完了。难道没有么……

generic.trans: 我的天啊，又是一道大菜！

full.en: Looks like more than three little piggies in there.
full.trans: 看起来里面不止住了三只小猪。

dryinginrain.en: Now it is more like a rehydrating rack...
dryinginrain.trans: 现在它更像是让食物保湿的架子...

done.en: Ready to test on my teeth!

generic.en: Just like the chefs of the stone age!
generic.trans: 就像石器时代的厨师一样！

wx78_scanner_item.en: It seems vaguely potato shaped... or perhaps I'm just hungry.
wx78_scanner_item.trans: 似乎隐约是土豆的形状……也可能我只是饿了。

feather_robin.en: A bird's feather, in cherry red.
feather_robin.trans: 一根鸟羽，有着樱桃的红色。

tomato_seeds.en: What fresh ingredients will grow from these?
tomato_seeds.trans: 能长出什么新鲜的原料呢？

alterguardian_phase3.en: I'd rather not be fried by that fiery gaze!
alterguardian_phase3.trans: 我可不想被那火热的注视给烧焦！

kitcoon_grass.en: You're so sweet, I could just eat you up!
kitcoon_grass.trans: 你这么可爱，真的忍不住想吞你下去。

moon_altar_link.en: It needs just a bit more time in the oven.

yoth_knightstick.en: I will be quick as a horse!

marblebean_sapling.trans: 是一个小的大理石宝宝。

ghostlyelixir_fastregen.en: I'm not sure about some of those ingredients, mademoiselle.
ghostlyelixir_fastregen.trans: 我对有些配方不是很有信心，小姐。

yellowmooneye.en: Keep an eye out for me, oui?

statuemaxwell.en: He is literally made of stone.

generic.trans: 多么温暖又令人安心的光！

armorwagpunk.en: A hard shell to protect my soft, delicious insides.
armorwagpunk.trans: 一个坚硬的外壳，保护我柔软美味的内在。

rope_bridge_kit.en: This looks like a recipe for disaster.
rope_bridge_kit.trans: 这看起来像是一场灾难。

lavaarena_boarlord.en: He's the one who cooked up this whole thing.

bomb_lunarplant_wormwood.en: That one seems to have a little extra spice.

stinger.en: It would really sting to not have a use for this.
stinger.trans: 这东西派不上用场真头痛。

wagpunkhat.en: It stirs up such pugnacious thoughts in my mind!

poweroff.en: This looks like it hasn't been used in a long time.
poweroff.trans: 这个好像很久没有用过了。

generic.en: I wonder what this machine will cook up for us.
generic.trans: 不知道这台机器会给我们煮出什么东西来。

generic.en: Winona cooked it up with some help from that strange gentleman.
generic.trans: 在那位古怪先生的帮助下，薇诺娜鼓捣出了这道菜。

steelwool.en: I used to use this to scrub dishes.
steelwool.trans: 我以前会用它来洗盘子。

hermitcrabtea_tillweed.en: I do not mind the taste of this wholesome tonic.
hermitcrabtea_tillweed.trans: 这杯养生茶的味道我勉强还能接受。

red_cap_cooked.en: Perhaps I could make a good soup.
red_cap_cooked.trans: 也许我能用它做出不错的汤。

oceanfishingbobber_robin_winter.en: Feathers are surprisingly useful for fishing!
oceanfishingbobber_robin_winter.trans: 羽毛用来钓鱼真是出奇的好用！

ancienttree_seed.en: I wonder what it might grow into?

mutator_warrior.en: Next time, let's bake something together, non?
mutator_warrior.trans: 下次我们一起来烘焙，好不好？

maxwellhead.trans: 他肯定吃了大量的三文治。

dreadstonehat.trans: 我的头已经感觉更安全了。

accomplishment_shrine.en: I always wished to make a name for myself.

armorslurper.en: Ah. My appetite wanes under its protection.
armorslurper.trans: 啊，在它的保护之下我的食欲下降了。

yotb.en: Perhaps I should show it to the judge, to get a measure of his taste.
yotb.trans: 也许我该把它拿给评委看看，了解一下他的品位。

seeds_cooked.trans: 可以加点烟熏红辣椒粉...

boneshard.en: I could make a hearty stock with these.
boneshard.trans: 我可以用这些东西熬出一锅丰盛的高汤。

candybag.en: Where I keep all my confections!
candybag.trans: 我所有的糖果都会装在里面！

mutatedbearger.en: My, it seems that crystal really sticks to your ribs.
mutatedbearger.trans: 天哪，水晶好像粘在你的肋骨上了。

book_fish.en: Sadly, it doesn't include any seafood recipes.
book_fish.trans: 可惜它并没有包含任何海鲜菜谱。

dragonchilisalad.en: A hint of spice to awaken the tastebuds.

turnip_seeds.en: What fresh ingredients will grow from these?
turnip_seeds.trans: 能长出什么新鲜的原料呢？

low.en: Like a pie on a proverbial windowsill, it will soon cool.
low.trans: 像摆放在窗台上的馅饼一样，它很快就会变凉。

out.en: It has no heat left to give.

scandata.en: What is this they're cooking up?

wagstaff_tool_1.en: This must be what I'm looking for!
wagstaff_tool_1.trans: 这应该就是我在找的东西！

wagstaff_tool_2.en: Surely this must be the tool he wants?
wagstaff_tool_2.trans: 这应该就是他想要的工具吧？

batnose.en: This will be a challenging ingredient.
batnose.trans: 这将是一种有挑战性的原料。

wagstaff_tool_3.en: That certainly looks like a scientific tool of some sort!
wagstaff_tool_3.trans: 那个一看就是某种科学工具！

butterflywings.en: I wonder what dishes I could create with these?
butterflywings.trans: 我想知道用这些东西可以做成什么菜？

armor_sanity.en: Am I crazy to wear this?

wagstaff_tool_4.en: Perhaps that is what he is looking for?
wagstaff_tool_4.trans: 也许这就是他在找的东西？

wagstaff_tool_5.en: It's a tool of some sort, hopefully the one I'm looking for.
wagstaff_tool_5.trans: 它是某种工具，希望是我要找的那种。

panettone.trans: 意大利的传统耶诞节美食。

wx78module_maxhealth2.en: They give our metal friend a little extra zest, non?
wx78module_maxhealth2.trans: 能给我们的金属朋友带来了一点额外的风味，不是吗？

slingshotammo_stinger.en: This looks like a key ingredient for a slingshot.
slingshotammo_stinger.trans: 这看起来像是弹弓的关键组件。

book_fire.en: That reminds me, I should make some flame-grilled skewers for dinner.
book_fire.trans: 正好提醒了我，应该做一些烤串作为晚餐。

steeringwheel_item.en: We can't set sail without this.
steeringwheel_item.trans: 少了这个东西我们就不能扬帆起航了。

cactus_flower.en: Such a pretty flower from such a prickly customer!
cactus_flower.trans: 这个多刺的家伙开出的花这么漂亮！

fishmeat_small_cooked.en: Could use fresh herbs and butter...
fishmeat_small_cooked.trans: 可以加点新鲜的香草和黄油...

goose_feather.trans: 这里曾经有一只拔了毛的鹅。

torch.en: Not great for caramelizing crème brûlée, but it will do for seeing.
torch.trans: 不适合烤焦糖布丁，但是能提供点视野。

glassblock.en: Reminds me of the ice sculptures in the ship's dining hall.
glassblock.trans: 让我想起了船上宴席厅里的冰雕。

generic.en: Maman used to keep a journal, before her memory went.
generic.trans: 妈妈在记忆里衰退前曾经写过一本日记。

chesspiece_sharkboi.en: It seemed to think it was top of the food chain.
chesspiece_sharkboi.trans: 它似乎认为自己是食物链的顶端。

bunnyman.en: I have so many good rabbit recipes...
bunnyman.trans: 我有很多不错的兔肉烹饪食谱...

burnt.trans: 它现在什么也测量不了了...

generic.en: It measures moisture in the clouds.
generic.trans: 它用来测量云里的水汽。

spiderhat.en: Well, it is on my head now. Best make the most of it.
spiderhat.trans: 现在它戴在我的脑袋上了。最好是充分利用它。

beefalofeed.en: My beast could use some more meat on its bones.

chum.en: I suppose fish don't have an especially sophisticated palate.
chum.trans: 看来鱼儿的味蕾也不是很精致。

lunarthrall_plant_vine_end.en: I'm afraid it won't give up without a fight.
lunarthrall_plant_vine_end.trans: 恐怕不打一架它就不会善罢甘休。

nightcaphat.en: A short nap might be nice.
nightcaphat.trans: 短暂午睡一下是十分好的。

picked.en: There is nothing left for me to grasp!
picked.trans: 没有什么东西可供我采摘的了！

diseased.en: Would some nice soup make you feel better?
diseased.trans: 喝点鲜美的汤羹会不会让你好点呢？

generic.en: Those could be key to my continued survival.
generic.trans: 这些可能是我继续活下去的关键。

punchingbag.en: It's a relief to practice on something that won't hit me back.
punchingbag.trans: 在打不还手的东西上练习是一种释放。

carnivaldecor_figure_kit_season2.en: I wonder what could be inside?

turf_fungus_red.en: It's like an ingredient for the ground.
turf_fungus_red.trans: 这就像是一种给地面的调料。

voidcloth_umbrella.en: I fear it will bring bad luck whether it's opened indoors or not.
voidcloth_umbrella.trans: 恐怕在不在室内打开，它都会带来厄运。

seafoodgumbo.en: Incredible! Just like Nana used to make!
seafoodgumbo.trans: 难以置信！就像奶奶以前做的一样！

costume_mirror_body.en: I wonder whose costume this could be?
costume_mirror_body.trans: 我想知道这是谁的服装？

sweatervest.en: I feel so much better all of the sudden.

almost_done_cooking.en: Ah, that delicious aroma tells me it's almost done!
almost_done_cooking.trans: 啊，这阵香气说明马上就可以起锅了！

generic.trans: 总算找到一个优质的烤箱了！

firecrackers.en: Like oil splattering in a hot pan.

generic.en: Ooh la la, the things I could do with you!
generic.trans: 哦啦啦，我可以对你做很多事！

burnt.en: Not even the cheeks are left...

generic.en: I do enjoy a good rabbit stew. I should show them my appreciation.
generic.trans: 我确实喜欢炖兔子肉。我应该向他们表达我的感激。

oceanfishingbobber_none.en: A float might make fishing easier.
oceanfishingbobber_none.trans: 有个浮漂会容易钓很多。

tophat_magician.en: I can't think of any occasion I'd wear that to.

oceanfishinglure_spinner_red.en: Not very appetizing, but fish seem to like it.
oceanfishinglure_spinner_red.trans: 看起来有些倒胃口，但是鱼好像很喜欢。

farm_plow_item.en: Now, where to start the garden...
farm_plow_item.trans: 从哪里开始开垦园地好呢……

battlesong_lunaraligned.en: I didn't know she was such an accomplished singer!
battlesong_lunaraligned.trans: 当真没看出她是一位如此有成就的歌唱家!

oceanvine.trans: 哎。又是一根不挂葡萄的藤。

corn_oversized.en: Let's see, what shall I make with you? Corn gratin? Maque choux?
corn_oversized.trans: 让我想想，用你做点什么？玉米烤肉？玉米饼？

off.en: It isn't working at the moment.

hermitcrabtea_forgetmelots.en: This mixture will be good for a splitting headache.
hermitcrabtea_forgetmelots.trans: 这配方对剧烈头痛有帮助。

dumbbell_golden.en: All of my arm strength comes from whisking egg whites.
dumbbell_golden.trans: 我所有的臂力都来自于打发蛋清。

decor_portraitframe.en: I long to see the face of Maman.
decor_portraitframe.trans: 我渴望看到妈妈的脸庞。

shellweaver.en: These recipes all call for a pinch of salt.
shellweaver.trans: 这些配方可都离不开一小撮盐。

batwing.en: Hmmm, maybe a soup stock of batwings?
batwing.trans: 唔，也许能做成蝙蝠翅高汤？

slingshotammo_horrorfuel.en: This looks like a key ingredient for a slingshot.
slingshotammo_horrorfuel.trans: 这看起来像是弹弓的关键组件。

oceanfishingrod.en: I wonder what deep sea delicacies are waiting for me?
oceanfishingrod.trans: 有哪些深海美味在等着我呢？

generic.trans: 多么有威胁性的雕像啊！

rock_avocado_fruit_sprout.en: Let's find somewhere to plant this.

carnivaldecor_banner.en: It adds a lovely atmosphere, non?
carnivaldecor_banner.trans: 它增加了一种可爱的气氛，不是吗？

bird_egg_cooked.en: Could use a few different herbs...
bird_egg_cooked.trans: 可以加一些不同的香草...

pumpkin.en: I'm the pumpking of the world!
pumpkin.trans: 我是这世界上的南瓜王！

wx78module_maxsanity1.en: They give our metal friend a little extra zest, non?
wx78module_maxsanity1.trans: 能给我们的金属朋友带来了一点额外的风味，不是吗？

pumpkin_seeds.en: Future ingredients, just waiting to be grown!
pumpkin_seeds.trans: 未来的食材，就等着你来种!

slingshot_band_mimic.en: Young Walter is an artist with his slingshot.
slingshot_band_mimic.trans: 小沃尔特是一位弹弓艺术家。

reskin_tool.en: Ah, this will help freshen up the place, non?
reskin_tool.trans: 啊，它能让整个地方都新鲜起来，不是吗？

festive_blueprint.en: Just the right thing for a celebration.

burning.en: It, oh, it appears to be on fire.

generic.en: It's a tree made of kabob sticks.

book_silviculture.en: Perhaps it will tell me the best places to find mushrooms.
book_silviculture.trans: 也许它能告诉我找到蘑菇的最佳地点。

mashedpotatoes.en: The secret is to use a whole stick of butter.
mashedpotatoes.trans: 秘方就是用一整块黄油。

berries_juicy_cooked.en: I'd have preferred to cook them into a proper dish.
berries_juicy_cooked.trans: 必须是恰当的料理才能入我的口。

cool.en: The top has cooled like a barfy crème brûlée!
cool.trans: 表面已经冷却了，像焦糖布丁一样。

hot.en: A chef-cuisinier never burns his fingers.
hot.trans: 一位主厨是绝对不会烫到手指的。

turf_archive.en: It's like an ingredient for the ground.
turf_archive.trans: 这就像是一种给地面的调料。

webberskull.en: Stop staring at me or I'll bury you!
webberskull.trans: 别盯着我，不然我会埋了你！

exposed.en: Ah zut, that stone is far too tough for me to break.
exposed.trans: 啊这，石头太硬了，我破坏不了。

generic.en: Perhaps I could free the poor creature?
generic.trans: 没准我能放了那只可怜的生物？

turf_forest.en: It's like an ingredient for the ground.
turf_forest.trans: 这就像是一种给地面的调料。

hareball.en: The thought of anyone eating this wounds me deeply.
hareball.trans: 一想到有人吃这个，我就深受伤害。

chesspiece_antlion.en: I do like her better like this.

beeguard.en: Oh non non non, I hate being stung!

generic.en: A bit of furniture would be nice around here.
generic.trans: 在这里添置点家具确实不错。

plantregistryhat.en: It never hurts to learn more about what goes into your food.
plantregistryhat.trans: 多了解食物中的成分永远不会有坏处。

generic_largestack.en: Mon dieu, a mountain of tickets!
generic_largestack.trans: 我的天啊，一座奖票的小山！

costume_doll_body.en: It seems to be a costume for a doll.

burnt.en: That fire got the smell out.

generic.en: Fisherfolk live here. I can smell it.
generic.trans: 这里住着渔民，我闻得出来。

spore_moon.en: Keep those away from my soufflés!
spore_moon.trans: 让那些东西远离我的蛋白牛奶酥！

oceanfishinglure_hermit_snow.en: A chilly lure, purchased from an icy shopkeep.
oceanfishinglure_hermit_snow.trans: 跟一位高冷的店主买来的冰凉鱼饵。

covered.en: Parts of it look like they were sculpted.

boatrace_spectator_dragonling.en: Bonjour! Are you here to cheer me on?
boatrace_spectator_dragonling.trans: 你好！你是来为我喝彩的吗？

generic.en: Ah, non! I cannot make out the recipe!
generic.trans: 啊，不！我无法辨认出食谱！

turf_rocky.en: It's like an ingredient for the ground.
turf_rocky.trans: 这就像是一种给地面的调料。

held.trans: 别从我的黄油手中溜走。

generic.en: Your aerial dance is so soothing to behold...
generic.trans: 你的空中舞蹈看起来如此舒心...

turf_shellbeach.en: It's like an ingredient for the ground.
turf_shellbeach.trans: 这就像是一种给地面的调料。

generic.en: A pinecone should get things rolling.

turf_underrock.en: It's like an ingredient for the ground.
turf_underrock.trans: 这就像是一种给地面的调料。

oceanfishinglure_spoon_red.en: Not very appetizing, but smaller fish seem to like it.
oceanfishinglure_spoon_red.trans: 看起来有些倒胃口，但是小鱼好像很喜欢。

chesspiece_deerclops_mutated.en: Brr... it still gives me the shivers...
chesspiece_deerclops_mutated.trans: 啵……我就算现在看到还是会浑身发抖……

eggplant_cooked.en: Could use tomato sauce and Parmesan...
eggplant_cooked.trans: 可以加点番茄酱和帕尔马干酪...

slingshotammo_container.en: I hope Walter can hunt more protein for us.
slingshotammo_container.trans: 希望沃尔特能为我们多猎取一些蛋白质。"

vault_chandelier_broken.en: Lucky I was not standing under when it fell!
vault_chandelier_broken.trans: 幸好它掉下来时我没站在下面！

ancienttree_sapling_item.en: Allons-y! I can't just leave this little tree uprooted!
ancienttree_sapling_item.trans: 出发吧！我不能让这棵小树被连根拔起！

moon_altar_ward.en: Patience mon ami, you'll be home soon.
moon_altar_ward.trans: 保持耐心，我的朋友，马上就能回家了。

slingshotammo_dreadstone.en: This looks like a key ingredient for a slingshot.
slingshotammo_dreadstone.trans: 这看起来像是弹弓的关键组件。

chesspiece_depthworm.en: How could I forget the chewing.
chesspiece_depthworm.trans: 我怎么可能忘记那个咀嚼声。

rock_avocado_fruit.en: You can't expect me to eat this!
rock_avocado_fruit.trans: 不要指望我会吃这东西！

dragonfruit_seeds.en: Future ingredients, just waiting to be grown!
dragonfruit_seeds.trans: 未来的食材，就等着你来种!

generic.en: I was hoping there would still be a fresh clam inside...
generic.trans: 我还指望着能挖到个新鲜的扇贝……

critter_lamb.en: This is Lambchop, my little kitchen helper.
critter_lamb.trans: 这是羊排，我的厨房小帮手。

alterguardian_phase3deadorb.en: Is there more yet in store for us?

oceanfishinglure_hermit_drowsy.en: I'd better handle this one carefully.

wormlight_plant.trans: 我看不出这里有什么不对劲。

oceanwhirlportal.en: Someone is really stirring the soup.
oceanwhirlportal.trans: 真的有人在搅动这锅粥。

stalker_atrium.en: This won't be an easy fight.

bishop.en: You don't strike me as particularly spiritual.
bishop.trans: 我并不认为你是精神领袖。

freshlight.en: Now we can all shine a little brighter.
freshlight.trans: 现在我们都可以发光发亮了。

generic.trans: 漂亮，不过我还是偏爱面粉。

empty.en: We must replace these at once.
empty.trans: 我们必须立即更换这些。

figkabab.en: Something about being on a stick brings out more of the flavor.
figkabab.trans: 只要拿棍子一串，就能激发出更多的美味。

shadow_battleaxe.en: I've never seen a cleaver like that before.
shadow_battleaxe.trans: 我以前从未见过这样的切肉刀。

onion_cooked.en: I would prefer to put this to better use.
onion_cooked.trans: 我宁愿让它有更好的用途。

generic.en: I wonder if there's something delicious inside...
generic.trans: 不知道里面有没有什么好吃的……

generic.en: Do you hear the seashells sing?
generic.trans: 你听到了贝壳的歌声吗？

generic.en: Maman had a lovely seashell collection.
generic.trans: 妈妈原来收集了很多漂亮贝壳。

yotd_steeringwheel.en: Today I am sailing in style!
yotd_steeringwheel.trans: 今天，我要用风范扬起风帆！

flotationcushion.en: It will save me from the brine!

turf_woodfloor.en: It's like an ingredient for the ground.
turf_woodfloor.trans: 这就像是一种给地面的调料。

seeds.en: You may grow up to be delicious one day.
seeds.trans: 总有一天，你会长成美味的食物。

carnivaldecor_banner_kit.en: I'll have it whipped up in no time at all.
carnivaldecor_banner_kit.trans: 我三下五除二就能给它做好。

pig_token.en: I'll try not to spend it all in one place.
pig_token.trans: 我尽量不把钱花在一个地方。

broken.en: It is in need of repair.

imprisoned.en: I don't know whether to feel fear or pity.
imprisoned.trans: 我不知道是该害怕还是该同情。

generic.en: Must have been a pretty important, uh, thingy...
generic.trans: 肯定是个很重要的，呃，东西...

feather_canary.en: A bird's feather, in lemon yellow.

deserthat.en: Goggles would be quite useful. I need my eyes.
deserthat.trans: 有个护目镜就好了。我留着双眼有大用。

valid.en: The gems seem to be important.

mastupgrade_lamp_item.en: It does lighten the mood considerably.
mastupgrade_lamp_item.trans: 这确实让人心情轻松不少。

armorgrass.en: How much protection can grass really provide?
armorgrass.trans: 草究竟能提供多少保护？

gestalt_guard.en: I think it would be wise to stay out of their way.

on.en: There's a strange force behind this.
on.trans: 它的后面似乎有一种神秘力量。

dragonboat_kit.en: Just like a gravy boat, minus the gravy.
dragonboat_kit.trans: 就像肉汁船，只是没肉汁而已。

firestarter.en: %s's fires burn as wildly as her passions.
firestarter.trans: %s的火如同她的激情一样，熊熊燃烧。

ghost.en: I'm surprised I outlived %s, frankly.
ghost.trans: 我还挺吃惊的，我竟然活的比%s长，说真的。

murderer.en: %s has done something truly abominable.
murderer.trans: %s干了一件大坏事。

attacker.en: I fear %s more than anyone here.

reviver.en: %s is a great ally, indeed.

pickaxe.en: For those tough to crack nuts.
pickaxe.trans: 用来对付那些难以打开的坚果。

mast.en: An important ingredient for any sailboat.

antliontrinket.en: I think I know someone who would want this.
antliontrinket.trans: 我应该认识想要这个的人。

flower_cave.en: Ah, a light in the dark.

cooking_long.trans: 经典之作是需要时间的。

costume_queen_body.en: It seems to be a costume fit for a Queen.

mermguard_lunar.en: The merms have been looking a little... different lately.
mermguard_lunar.trans: 鱼人们最近看起来有点……不一样。

chesspiece_malbatross.en: I hope this won't bring us ill luck at sea...
chesspiece_malbatross.trans: 希望这个不要让我们在海上时遇到厄运……

onion_seeds.en: What fresh ingredients will grow from these?
onion_seeds.trans: 能长出什么新鲜的原料呢？

burning.en: It's too soon to start cooking!
burning.trans: 现在开始做饭还太早了!

growing.en: The garden is coming along nicely.
growing.trans: 小园子郁郁葱葱，枝繁叶茂。

full_weed.en: It seems my garden is full of weeds!
full_weed.trans: 我的花园里好像长满了杂草!

seed.en: All good things come with time.
seed.trans: 美好的事物都会随着时间的推移而到来。

playbill_the_doll.en: I wonder who will play the lead?
playbill_the_doll.trans: 我想知道由谁来扮演主角？

ancientfruit_gem.en: I wonder if it's possible to cook such a stony fruit?
ancientfruit_gem.trans: 我在想这种石头一样的水果能煮熟吗？

robot_puppet.en: Surely no one deserves such treatment!
robot_puppet.trans: 显然，任何人都不该受到这样的对待！

generic.en: Sing me your sweet song, mon amie.
generic.trans: 为我唱一首香颂吧，我的朋友。

fishmeat_cooked.en: Could use a squeeze of lemon...

held.en: I do not care to be this close to it! Vile!
held.trans: 我不在乎和它近距离接触！卑鄙的家伙！

generic.en: We disagree on where my blood is best used.
generic.trans: 关于我的血液最该用在哪里，我们没法达成一致。

spiderden_bedazzler.en: It's nice to see the petit monsieur expressing his creativity!
spiderden_bedazzler.trans: 这位小先生发挥了他的创意，真是太好了！

oceanfish_medium_9.en: The meat has a subtle sweetness that makes for some interesting dishes.
oceanfish_medium_9.trans: 它肉味微甜的特性可以做出一些有趣的菜肴。

oceanfish_medium_8.en: I prefer to use fresh fish, not frozen...
oceanfish_medium_8.trans: 我偏爱使用鲜鱼，而非冻鱼……

oceanfish_medium_7.en: Its scales have such a lovely sheen.
oceanfish_medium_7.trans: 鳞片闪耀着可爱的光泽。

glassspike.en: I prefer my decor a smidge less... stabby.
glassspike.trans: 装潢还是不要这么尖锐的好。

oceanfish_medium_6.en: Its scales have such a lovely sheen.
oceanfish_medium_6.trans: 鳞片闪耀着可爱的光泽。

oceanfish_medium_5.en: Ah, some butter, some salt, and you'll be scrumptious!
oceanfish_medium_5.trans: 啊，来点黄油，再撒点盐，你会是绝佳美味！

oceanfish_medium_4.en: Ah yes, with a squeeze of lemon, some pepper...
oceanfish_medium_4.trans: 啊对，挤点柠檬汁，撒点胡椒……

oceanfish_medium_3.en: Hm, I wonder if those spines are poisonous.
oceanfish_medium_3.trans: 嗯，我不知道那些鳍刺是不是有毒。

wathgrithr_shield.en: Mon dieu, it's heavier than it looks!
wathgrithr_shield.trans: 我的天啊，没看出来这么沉！

oceanfish_medium_2.en: You will make a fine fish dinner!
oceanfish_medium_2.trans: 你可以做成一顿精美的海鲜晚餐。

petrified_tree.en: This tree is made of stone.

oceanfish_medium_1.en: I've worked with worse looking ingredients.
oceanfish_medium_1.trans: 我料理过比这个还丑的食材。

generic.en: I'm starting to think Mme. Wanda has a bit of pent up aggression...
generic.trans: 我开始觉得旺达夫人有些被压抑的侵略性……

broken.en: My mechanical friend seems intent on fixing it.
broken.trans: 我的机器朋友铁了心要修好它。

moonstaff.en: That looks ripe for the taking.

wrongstaff.en: I think it wants something else.

staffed.en: I thought something would have happened.

generic.en: What goes in the middle, I wonder?

yotr_decor_1_item.en: Now, to find the perfect placement for it.
yotr_decor_1_item.trans: 来给它找一个好位置吧。

spiderden.en: A spider has to live somewhere, I suppose.
spiderden.trans: 我觉得这里肯定住着蜘蛛。

dragonheadhat.en: Oh! Do I get to be the head?

generic.en: All that is left to do is turn it on.
generic.trans: 剩下要做的就是把它打开。

activated.en: Ah, bon! It will take care of the sailing for me.
activated.trans: 啊，好啊！它将为我处理好航行问题。

farm_hoe.en: I'd better get planting if I want some fresh ingredients.
farm_hoe.trans: 要想吃到新鲜的食材，我还是动手种吧。

chesspiece_twinsofterror.en: They weren't the most polite guests, non?
chesspiece_twinsofterror.trans: 他们并不是最礼貌的客人，不是吗？

book_temperature.en: A consistent temperature is very important for cooking.
book_temperature.trans: 保持温度稳定对烹饪至关重要。

plant.trans: 我看不出这里有什么不对劲。

mooseegg.en: I think I'll leave this egg quite alone!
mooseegg.trans: 我想我还是不要管这个蛋了！

carnivaldecor_plant.en: Perhaps it will attract normal sized crows?
carnivaldecor_plant.trans: 也许它能引来正常大小的乌鸦？

skeleton.en: It is not waking up. Oh dear.

hungry.en: Let me cook something nice up for you.

starving.en: Oh, what do birds eat? A nice brisket?
starving.trans: 唔，鸟吃什么？上好牛胸肉？

occupied.en: I now have an egg farm!
occupied.trans: 我现在有了一个鸟蛋农场！

generic.en: Suitable lodgings for a feathered beast.
generic.trans: 这个住处最适合长羽毛的动物了。

onion_oversized.en: You can never have enough onion.

fish_box.en: Is the fish fresh or canned? I feel rather conflicted.
fish_box.trans: 新鲜的鱼还是罐头鱼？我好矛盾。

generic.trans: 不值得为了蜂蜜去冒险！

chesspiece_daywalker2.en: He put me off pork for some time.
chesspiece_daywalker2.trans: 它让我好一段时间都不想吃猪肉。

generic.en: Fresh ingredients, ripe for the taking.
generic.trans: 新鲜的原料，已经成熟，可以采摘。

yotb.en: Perhaps I should show it to the judge, to get a measure of his taste.
yotb.trans: 也许我该把它拿给评委看看，了解一下他的品位。

beast_blueprint.en: The beefalo who will wear this is lucky indeed!
beast_blueprint.trans: 只有幸运的皮弗娄牛才能穿上这件华服！

generic.en: Those monkeys seem to be enjoying the high life out here, non?
generic.trans: 那些猴子似乎在享受这里的优渥生活，不是吗？

burnt.en: It actually gives off a rather pleasant aroma of roasted bananas...
burnt.trans: 仔细闻，它散发着一种相当令人愉快的烤香蕉的香味……

lowpower.en: It's getting a bit low, Winona.

burning.en: It, oh, it appears to be on fire.

generic.en: It's nice to have Winona around.

off.en: What sort of fuel does this take?

book_sleep.en: It's tradition to nap after a good meal.
book_sleep.trans: 美餐一顿后必须小憩片刻，这是传统。

critter_bulbin.en: It never hurts to have a little onion on hand.
critter_bulbin.trans: 手边有点小小的洋葱总不会错。

saddle_basic.en: Let's see if I can ride on this.
saddle_basic.trans: 让我看看能不能骑上它。

sleeping.en: Perhaps a good time to harvest?

recharging.en: I don't think it's ready just yet.

generic.en: Maybe I could ask her to make me a kitchen timer...
generic.trans: 也许我可以让她给我做一个厨房定时器……

lunarplant_kit.en: I usually whip things up from scratch.

playing.en: Quite the demanding group of diners.
playing.trans: 真是一群挑剔的食客啊。

generic.en: I should feed it something shiny.
generic.trans: 我应该给它喂点发光的东西。

monstertartare.en: This is a culinary abomination. I'm appalled.
monstertartare.trans: 这是令人厌恶的烹饪产物。我被吓到了。

messagebottleempty.en: There's nothing sadder than a jam-less jam jar.
messagebottleempty.trans: 最悲伤的事情莫过于果酱瓶里没有果酱。

held.en: Would you be a meat or a vegetable?

dead.en: I wonder what you'd taste like.
dead.trans: 不知道你是什么味道的。

generic.en: I... think I had a nightmare like this once.
generic.trans: 我以前有过这样的噩梦。

book_horticulture_upgraded.en: I'm more interested in preparing vegetables after they're grown.
book_horticulture_upgraded.trans: 比起种菜，我对做菜更感兴趣。

spat.en: I do enjoy a good mutton.

yoth_lance.en: This will make a big shish kebab!

kitcoon_rocky.en: You're so sweet, I could just eat you up!
kitcoon_rocky.trans: 你这么可爱，真的忍不住想吞你下去。

moose_nesting_ground.en: Imagine how many omelettes I could make with one of those eggs.
moose_nesting_ground.trans: 这种蛋只用一颗就能做出好多份煎蛋。

turf_fungus_green.en: It's like an ingredient for the ground.
turf_fungus_green.trans: 这就像是一种给地面的调料。

farm_soil_debris.en: There's a bit of unwanted garnish in my garden.
farm_soil_debris.trans: 我的花园里有一点多余的装饰物。

bullkelp_root.en: Perhaps it'll grow if I plant it.
bullkelp_root.trans: 如果种下去，也许会有收获。

armor_yoth_knight.en: It is the shining armor of a knight!

cookiecuttershell.en: Reminds me a bit of a durian... mostly the smell.
cookiecuttershell.trans: 让我想起了榴莲……主要是气味。

spider_dropper.en: Ah, the old "drop from the ceiling and commit violent acts" act.
spider_dropper.trans: 啊，“从天而降并实施暴力行为”的老派做法。

moonspiderden.en: Something is different about that spider den...

alterguardian_phase3dead.trans: 天下没有不散的筵席，结束了。

bananabush.en: Ah, I've stumbled on some fresh bananas!
bananabush.trans: 啊，我偶然发现了一些新鲜的香蕉！

dead.en: I'll eat your legs for dinner!
dead.trans: 晚餐的时候我要吃掉你的腿！

generic.trans: 一些喜欢野外生活的人造了这个。

dug_bananabush.en: Ah, I've stumbled on some fresh bananas!
dug_bananabush.trans: 啊，我偶然发现了一些新鲜的香蕉！

treegrowthsolution.en: A growing tree should eat well!
treegrowthsolution.trans: 一棵成长中的树一定不能缺营养！

fence_rotator.en: I should poke it into a freshly made fence, to see if it's done.
fence_rotator.trans: 我应该拿它刺一下新做的栅栏，看看它有几成熟。

wx78module_heat.en: They give our metal friend a little extra zest, non?
wx78module_heat.trans: 能给我们的金属朋友带来了一点额外的风味，不是吗？

slingshotammo_gunpowder.en: This looks like a key ingredient for a slingshot.
slingshotammo_gunpowder.trans: 这看起来像是弹弓的关键组件。

grassgator.trans: 他似乎有着温柔的灵魂。

moqueca.en: I'm quite proud of how it turned out.
moqueca.trans: 能做成这样，我感到很骄傲。

yotr_token.en: Surely we can settle this without violence?
yotr_token.trans: 我们可以用非暴力的方式解决吧？

tentaclespike.trans: 它会像鱼刺一样梗在我的喉咙里。

marblepillar.trans: 我想知道用这个可以做出多少个厨房台面...

armorskeleton.en: I'm supposed to put that on?

generic.en: Ah, if only I had time for a nice soak.
generic.trans: 啊，要是有时间舒服的泡个澡就好了。

victorian_blueprint.en: It's hard not to think about seafood with all these scalloped edges.

merm_toolshed_upgraded.en: What have they cooked up in there?

generic.en: Comes in handy after a big lunch.
generic.trans: 在吃饱午餐后就会派上用场了。

spider_water.en: Mon dieu, these spiders have gotten their sea legs!
spider_water.trans: 我的天啊，这些蜘蛛已经不晕船了！

acorn_cooked.trans: 这个可以加点什么...什么都可以。

spider_healer_item.en: It only appeals to a very specific palate.

ghost.en: I don't think it bothers him as much as it does mortals.
ghost.trans: 他应该不像凡人那样为生死烦恼。

firestarter.en: It makes sense that he'd like fire.
firestarter.trans: 他喜欢玩火也是有道理的。

murderer.en: %s did something very, very cruel.
murderer.trans: %s做了残忍无比的事情。

attacker.en: I don't find %s's pranks very funny.

reviver.en: %s is a trickster, but he helps sometimes too.
reviver.trans: %s虽然是个骗术大师，但偶尔也会帮别人。

dock_woodposts_item.en: My dock needs a bit of garnish.

ghost.en: That looks very uncomfortable.
ghost.trans: 看起来很不舒服。

firestarter.en: Let's not trust %s with flammable things for now.

murderer.en: I may not have it in me to forgive %s.
murderer.trans: 我的境界还不到能原谅%s的地步。

attacker.en: %s has been irritable lately.

reviver.en: %s isn't bad, just a little crunchy on the outside.
reviver.trans: %s并不坏，只是有个坚硬的外壳.

purebrilliance.en: My, I've never seen anything shine so brightly.
purebrilliance.trans: 哎呀，我还没见过这么亮的东西呢。

mask_treehat.en: Is it time for a masquerade?

nonslipgritboosted.trans: 或许地面也该撒上一层盐，增加点“质感”。

carnivaldecor_lamp_kit.en: I'll have it whipped up in no time at all.
carnivaldecor_lamp_kit.trans: 我三下五除二就能给它做好。

inground.en: It'll be hard to harvest like that.

reviving.trans: 我的天啊！正在上演的是什么？

junk_pile.en: Perhaps there is something delicious hiding in its center?
junk_pile.trans: 也许它的中心藏着什么美味？

maxwellphonograph.en: I wonder what is in his record collection?
maxwellphonograph.trans: 我想知道他收集的唱片都有些什么？

retrieving_item.trans: 啊，太棒了！我抓到了个东西！

holding_item.en: Just what have I fished from the depths?

unwritten.en: I'll write a nice note for the next person.

generic.trans: 路标在这个地方有什么用？

poop.en: The end result of a fine meal.

mastupgrade_lightningrod_item.en: It will be sizzling with electricity in no time.

yotr_decor_2_item.en: Now, to find the perfect placement for it.
yotr_decor_2_item.trans: 来给它找一个好位置吧。

book_fossil.en: I don't think that's my forte.

uncovered.en: It's looking for its missing piece.

covered.en: What an odd shape for a rock.

garlic_cooked.en: What can I add this to?

chestupgrade_stacksize.en: Ah! Can this give me the storage space I crave?
chestupgrade_stacksize.trans: 啊！它能提供我渴望的存储空间吗？

chesspiece_pawn.en: It looks a bit like a pawn.

turf_sinkhole.en: It's like an ingredient for the ground.
turf_sinkhole.trans: 这就像是一种给地面的调料。

yotb_stage.en: Ah mes amis, I've been judged by top chefs - this is nothing!
yotb_stage.trans: 啊，朋友们，我接受过顶级大厨的评判——这不算什么！

complete.en: That looks about right. Now, what's the secret ingredient?
complete.trans: 看起来比较正确。那么究竟秘密成分是什么呢？

funny.en: At least it's good for a chuckle.

mask_ancient_masonhat.en: This belonged to a hard worker.

carnivalgame_herding_kit.en: I'll have it whipped up in no time at all.
carnivalgame_herding_kit.trans: 我三下五除二就能给它做好。

warglet.en: I won't be put on the menu today!

burnt.trans: 嗯，闻起来像是油炸蘑菇。

on.en: I do like being able to see.

koalefant_summer.en: Ah, you have fattened up nicely!

goldenpitchfork.en: A golden fork for a giant, oui?

asparagus_seeds.en: These will grow some nice fresh vegetables.
asparagus_seeds.trans: 它会长出一些新鲜的蔬菜。

kitcoonden_kit.en: I'll whip it together tout de suite.

kelp_cooked.en: This... could be a bit better.

oceanfishinglure_spinner_blue.en: Not very appetizing, but fish seem to like it.

recharging.en: I don't think it's ready just yet.

generic.en: Maybe I could ask her to make me a kitchen timer...
generic.trans: 也许我可以让她给我做一个厨房定时器……

powcake.en: I would not feed this to my worst enemies. Or would I...
powcake.trans: 我不会把这个给最可怕的敌人吃的。或者到底要不要...

generic.en: Part of my soul is within.
generic.trans: 我的一部分灵魂在里面。

burnt.en: It won't be much good now.

alterguardianhatshard.en: It's been broken down to its basic ingredients.

smallghost.en: Oh! You gave me a little fright!

battlesong_fireresistance.en: I didn't know she was such an accomplished singer!

builtup.en: I hope she's a bit more comfortable in there now.

generic.en: That poor old woman... living here all on her own...
generic.trans: 可怜的老妇……独居在那里……

generic.en: It looks a bit like a bishop.

activated.trans: 这意味着它正在发挥作用，不是吗？

shadowheart.en: That beef heart is almost certainly past its prime.
shadowheart.trans: 这颗牛心已经不是最新鲜的状态了。

generic.en: That is no ordinary tooth-lined hole in the ground!
generic.trans: 地上这个布满牙齿的洞绝不是普通的洞！

leafloaf.trans: 一个基本的食谱，但是因为使用了这种奇怪的肉得到了升华！

dragonbodyhat.en: I can be the middle of the dragon.
dragonbodyhat.trans: 我可以装作是龙的身子。

moon_altar_icon.en: I'll have you home tout de suite!

cursed_monkey_token.en: It gives me a strange, bad feeling...

mermwatchtower_noking.en: They don't look so friendly now...

trap_teeth.en: This is not a cruelty-free trap.

wall_ruins_item.trans: 这些东西所讲述的故事...很有意思...

tourtiere.en: Ah oui, now that's a meat pie!
tourtiere.trans: 啊，这就对了，这才是肉饼应有的样子！

wagboss_robot.en: But can it cook a soufflé?

blackflag.en: I don't know how comfortable I feel sailing under a pirate flag...

alterguardian_contained.en: It's gobbling up all the energy!

vault_orb.en: Is it a part of something?
vault_orb.trans: 这是某个东西的一部分吗？

roastturkey.en: The pièce de résistance of any holiday feast!

minotaurhorn.en: I wonder, if ground up into a powder...

generic.en: I can't believe mushrooms made something so pretty.
generic.trans: 不敢相信蘑菇能做这么漂亮的东西。

generic.en: A soldier of the exotic forest.

battlesong_container.en: When it's not holding songs, perhaps it could hold soup?
battlesong_container.trans: 不放歌的时候，也许可以放汤？

tallbirdegg_cooked.en: Could use sliced fried tomatoes and beans...

animal_track.en: These tracks point to fresh game.

costume_blacksmith_body.en: It seems to be a costume for a blacksmith.

wx78module_maxhunger.en: They give our metal friend a little extra zest, non?

oceanfish_small_9.en: I've never had food spit at me before.
oceanfish_small_9.trans: 我还从没被食物吐过口水。

playing.en: A test of my timing skills, non?
playing.trans: 这是对我计时技能的考验，不是吗？

generic.en: I should feed it something shiny.
generic.trans: 我应该给它喂点发光的东西。

battlesong_durability.en: I didn't know she was such an accomplished singer!
battlesong_durability.trans: 当真没看出她是一位如此有成就的歌唱家!

dragonpie.trans: 薄脆派皮，塞满果馅...简直是天堂美味！

oceanfish_small_5.en: Has this fish already been cooked?

oceanfish_small_8.trans: 我的天啊！我如果靠的太近，我就会被烤熟了！

oceanfish_small_7.en: It's almost too pretty to eat... almost.
oceanfish_small_7.trans: 几乎有些美丽的不忍食用……几乎。

oceanfish_small_1.en: This will barely do as an appetizer!
oceanfish_small_1.trans: 这个东西连开胃菜都做不成！

oceanfish_small_4.en: I do wish I had bigger fish to fry.
oceanfish_small_4.trans: 给我条大点的鱼炸就好了。

wall_moonrock.en: I do kind of wish it was made of cheese.
wall_moonrock.trans: 我真希望它是奶酪做的。

beehive.en: I can hear the activity within.

oceanfish_small_3.en: Small, but surely delicious with the right accoutrements!
oceanfish_small_3.trans: 虽然个头小，但是烹调得当的话一定风味绝佳。

cookedmeat.trans: 可以加点阿根廷香辣酱...

ghost.en: I cook so I don't have to think about my own mortality.
ghost.trans: 我烹饪是为了不用去烦恼生死。

firestarter.en: Mon dieu! Watch the fire!

murderer.en: Mon dieu! I'm a monster!
murderer.trans: 我的天啊！我是个怪兽！

attacker.en: %s, why fight when we can cook?

reviver.en: It's quite nice to have myself around.

generic.trans: 呵呵，你好啊，啊，原来是我。

chesspiece_klaus.en: A table centerpiece fit for a holiday feast.
chesspiece_klaus.trans: 适合节日盛宴的餐桌摆件。

held.trans: 噢，多可爱的一小块肉啊！

generic.en: Hm, I don't think I've cooked one of those before.
generic.trans: 嗯，我之前还没做过这个呢。

poweroff.en: Could this be a way home?

generic.en: Ah, I shouldn't have gotten my hopes up.
generic.trans: 啊，我不应该让自己有那么高的期望。

firestarter.en: Is there... a reason you're setting fires, Mme. %s?
firestarter.trans: 你放火是有什么理由吗，%s夫人？

ghost.en: Let's get you back on your feet, Mme. %s!
ghost.trans: 我来帮助你重新站起来，%s夫人！

murderer.en: I can never forgive you for what you've done, Mme. %s!
murderer.trans: 我绝不会原谅你的所作所为，%s夫人！

attacker.en: That doesn't seem like a good use of your time, Mme. %s.
attacker.trans: 你的时间用来做这个可不好，%s夫人。

reviver.en: I knew Mme. %s would come in my time of need.
reviver.trans: 我就知道%s夫人会为我雪中送炭。

tentacle_pillar_arm.en: If only it were squid and not... whatever it is...
tentacle_pillar_arm.trans: 如果它是鱿鱼而不是现在这样...那该多好...

dead_sea_bones.en: Hmm... that might be good in a soup.

boat_bumper_kelp.en: A helpful bit of garnish for the boat, non?
boat_bumper_kelp.trans: 对船来说是个有用的装饰品，不是吗？

ghostlyelixir_shadow.en: I'm not sure about some of those ingredients, mademoiselle.
ghostlyelixir_shadow.trans: 我对有些配方不是很有信心，小姐。

wagpunk_bits.en: Ingredients for some sort of machine?

malbatross_beak.en: I'm sure I could find a use for this.

deerclops.en: I once had a saucier who looked like that.
deerclops.trans: 我曾经有个调味厨师长得跟它很像。

merm_armory_upgraded.en: The fishmongers seem to be doing quite well for themselves.
merm_armory_upgraded.trans: 鱼贩们的生意似乎相当不错。

batnose_cooked.en: It could use some marinade, perhaps.
batnose_cooked.trans: 也许可以倒一些腌料酱汁。

houndwhistle.en: I think I'm too old to hear it.

beefalotreat.en: My beast deserves something delicious to eat.
beefalotreat.trans: 要给我的牛喂点好吃的。

burning.en: I'm afraid it's for the best.
burning.trans: 为了大局着想，只有如此了。

uncommon.trans: 这个就只有中等罕见了。

rare.trans: 一件精美的作品，特别罕见。

collapsedchest.en: I'm tired of the whole "deconstructed" trend.
collapsedchest.trans: 我已经对所谓的“解构”的潮流感到厌倦了。

carnival_prizebooth_kit.en: All the ingredients are together, now let's get cooking!
carnival_prizebooth_kit.trans: 所有原料都备齐了，现在让我们开做吧！

alterguardianhat.en: It makes me hear such sweet whispers...
alterguardianhat.trans: 那能让我听到甜蜜的低语……

compost.en: The garden needs to be fed too, and proper plating is important!
compost.trans: 园子也需要喂养，适当的加料很重要!

generic.en: I should show my appreciation for delicious, tender pork.
generic.trans: 对于鲜嫩美味的猪肉，我表示欣赏。

burnt.en: It spent a second too long in the oven.
burnt.trans: 炉子里多烤了一秒就成这样了。

empty.en: I think I should give it a gift.

marbleshrub.en: If marble beans can grow, maybe they can be eaten.
marbleshrub.trans: 大理石豆子能种的话，应该也能吃。

cannonball_rock_item.en: I hope it won't be needed.

cave_banana_cooked.en: Could use some oats and a few chocolate chips...
cave_banana_cooked.trans: 可以配上一些燕麦和巧克力粒...

pepper_oversized.trans: 多么令人印象深刻的辣椒啊!

cookiecutter.en: Could I interest you in something other than my boat?
cookiecutter.trans: 能不能给你点别的，让你别啃我的船？

batcave.en: I wouldn't want to disturb their peaceful slumber.
batcave.trans: 我不愿打扰他们的安睡。

perogies.en: Mmmmm, pockets of palate punching pleasure!
perogies.trans: 唔，味觉受到冲击的愉悦感一阵阵袭来！

dumbbell_gem.en: All of my arm strength comes from whisking egg whites.
dumbbell_gem.trans: 我所有的臂力都来自于打发蛋清。

turf_marsh.en: It's like an ingredient for the ground.
turf_marsh.trans: 这就像是一种给地面的调料。

yotb.en: Perhaps I should show it to the judge, to get a measure of his taste.
yotb.trans: 也许我该把它拿给评委看看，了解一下他的品位。

yotd_anchor_item.en: Looks like a recipe for an anchor.

generic.en: Not exactly a friendly-looking tree, non?
generic.trans: 这棵树看起来不太友好，不是吗？

firestarter.en: You know better than to set flames, Mademoiselle %s.

ghost.en: Oh non, non, non. Let's get you fixed up.
ghost.trans: 哦，不不不。咱们把你修好吧。

murderer.en: She's inflicted her grief upon others. Abominable.
murderer.trans: 她把悲痛发泄到了别人身上。令人发指。

attacker.en: Have you been up to mischief, Mademoiselle %s?

reviver.en: I'll cook her favorite dish for supper tonight.
reviver.trans: 今天晚餐，我要做她最喜欢的菜。

slingshotammo_marble.en: This looks like a key ingredient for a slingshot.
slingshotammo_marble.trans: 这看起来像是弹弓的关键组件。

oceanwhirlbigportalexit.en: Never know what I might find!
oceanwhirlbigportalexit.trans: 永远都不知道会发现什么！

shell_cluster.en: Perhaps I could break it open?

asparagus_oversized.en: Tres bon! You will make a lovely dish!
asparagus_oversized.trans: 太好了！你可以做成一道可爱的菜！

mandrake_planted.en: I could always use more fresh veg.

burnt.en: It's been burnt to a crisp.

redpouch.en: How nice it is to have luck on my side!

cookbook.en: I added a few of my own personal recipes.
cookbook.trans: 我加了几条自己的食谱进去。

redgem.trans: 里面燃烧着深邃的火焰。

lots.en: It's nice not to have to forage for the basics.
lots.trans: 不用找基本用品真是好。

some.en: Oh, my mushrooms are beginning to grow!

snowcovered.en: Mushrooms are out of season right now.

stuffed.en: My days of wild mushroom hunting are over!
stuffed.trans: 我找野蘑菇的日子结束了！

rotten.en: I'll need to find a replacement if I want fresh mushrooms.
rotten.trans: 想吃新鲜蘑菇的话得换一个了。

burnt.trans: 嗯，闻起来像是油炸蘑菇。

empty.en: I could grow some fresh mushrooms here.
empty.trans: 我可以在这种点新鲜的蘑菇。

slingshotammo_freeze.en: This looks like a key ingredient for a slingshot.
slingshotammo_freeze.trans: 这看起来像是弹弓的关键组件。

mermguard_shadow.trans: 这可不是什么令人欣慰的景象……
