chester.trans: 你看起来很可爱，但是不能吃。

charging.en: Perhaps I could ask Winona to pick up some ingredients for me.
charging.trans: 也许我可以让薇诺娜帮我买点食材。

charged.en: Perhaps I could ask Winona to pick up some ingredients for me.
charged.trans: 也许我可以让薇诺娜帮我买点食材。

generic.en: Perhaps I could ask Winona to pick up some ingredients for me.
generic.trans: 也许我可以让薇诺娜帮我买点食材。

royal_jelly.en: I feel inspired to try my hand at confections!
royal_jelly.trans: 我有点跃跃欲试，想做些糖果！

mapscroll.en: A blank map. Full of potential.

redlantern.en: I do like festivals like this.

lureplantbulb.en: Growing meat from the ground? Now I've seen it all...
lureplantbulb.trans: 从地上长出肉？现在我算是见识到了...

barnaclepita.en: An unconventional combination of ingredients, but delicious nonetheless!
barnaclepita.trans: 虽说是非常规的食材组合，但还是很美味的!

wx78module_maxsanity.en: They give our metal friend a little extra zest, non?
wx78module_maxsanity.trans: 能给我们的金属朋友带来了一点额外的风味，不是吗？

wrong_type.en: Ah no! That does not seem right!

burnt.en: Oh dear, it looks a bit overdone.

generic.en: Ah yes! A proper feasting table!
generic.trans: 啊，是的！一张得体的餐桌！

mushroombomb.en: We should get far away from that.

voidcloth_scythe.en: Did I just see it twitch?
voidcloth_scythe.trans: 它刚刚是抽搐了一下吗？

spring.en: What a pity rabbit season has ended.
spring.trans: 兔子出没的季节结束了，太可惜了。

generic.en: Thump twice if you are fat and juicy.
generic.trans: 要是你肥美多汁的话就跺两下脚吧。

closed.en: Don't take a bite out of me!

firestarter.en: Watch where you light those fires, %s.

ghost.en: Is there a medic on this island?
ghost.trans: 岛上有医务员吗？

murderer.en: What a terrible act you've committed.
murderer.trans: 看看你做了多恶劣的事情。

attacker.en: I didn't expect him to be the violent sort.

reviver.en: I love your act, by the way.
reviver.trans: 顺便说一下，我特别欣赏你的表演。

ready.en: Madame, I believe your honey is ready!

fullhoney.en: Madame, I believe your honey is ready!

generic.en: It's a little hive of honeymakers!

cabbagerolls.en: A surprisingly time consuming dish, but well worth the wait.
cabbagerolls.trans: 非常费时制作的美味，但绝对值得等待。

generic.en: Perhaps I will try my luck?

fence_electric_item.en: I must find a good spot for this.

koalefant_carcass.en: Sadly it is past its expiry date.

bugnet.trans: 用于捕捉另类的高蛋白动物。

yotr_food3.en: A feast for the eyes and my stomach.
yotr_food3.trans: 对我的双眼和胃都是一场盛宴。

yotr_food2.en: A part of me expected it to be cheesecake.
yotr_food2.trans: 我还有点指望它是芝士蛋糕呢。

yotr_food1.en: It's been so long since I've had such a scrumptious bite of carrot cake!
yotr_food1.trans: 我已经很久没有吃过这么美味的胡萝卜蛋糕了！

transistor.en: Positively charged to get my hands on one!
transistor.trans: 带正电的小零件，我忍不住想拥有！

slingshotammo_slow.en: This looks like a key ingredient for a slingshot.
slingshotammo_slow.trans: 这看起来像是弹弓的关键组件。

broken_forgeditem.en: Perhaps I could fix it, if I had the ingredients.
broken_forgeditem.trans: 如果我有原料的话，也许我可以修复它。

book_rain.en: Rainy days are good for reading.

generic.en: The eye follows me wherever I go...
generic.trans: 不论我去哪里，它的视线总是跟着我...

fruitflyfruit.en: They seem quite taken with whoever holds this.
fruitflyfruit.trans: 无论谁拿着这个，它们似乎都很喜欢。

bodypillow_beefalowool.en: Soft and dense, like a well-baked loaf of bread.
bodypillow_beefalowool.trans: 柔软而致密，就像一块烤得很好的面包。

deer_antler.en: It looks like a key, does it not?
deer_antler.trans: 它看起来像把钥匙，对不对？

merm_prince.en: Hm... he doesn't seem so different from the others.
merm_prince.trans: 嗯……他看起来跟其他鱼人没什么两样

whip.en: I'd rather whip up a nice meringue.

frogfishbowl.en: I think I've outdone myself, given the available ingredients.
frogfishbowl.trans: 我完全超越了自己，用有限的原料做出了这个。

mosquitomusk.trans: 为不请自己来的害虫们准备的。

ghostflower.en: Looking at it makes me feel... peaceful.
ghostflower.trans: 看着它让我感到……平和了。

firestarter.en: I assume she meant it to be a controlled burn.
firestarter.trans: 她应该以为能控制住火势吧。

ghost.en: It's not your time to go quite yet, Mme. %s.
ghost.trans: 你还不能沉默，%s夫人。

murderer.en: Mme. %s has done an unthinkable deed.
murderer.trans: %s夫人干了一件不可思议的事。

attacker.en: I thought you were more responsible that that, Mme. %s.
attacker.trans: 本以为你是个靠谱的人呢，%s夫人。

reviver.en: Mme. %s is a reliable sort.

waterplant_bomb.en: Pardonnez-moi! I didn't realize those barnacles were yours!
waterplant_bomb.trans: 对不起，我不知道那些藤壶是你的！

maxwellthrone.en: Heavy is the bum that sits on the throne...
maxwellthrone.trans: 王座上坐着的是不可承受之重...

crabking_claw.en: I had a nightmare like this back in culinary school.
crabking_claw.trans: 我在烹饪学校时做过这样的噩梦。

veggieomlet.en: The best way to start the day is with a hot breakfast.
veggieomlet.trans: 开始新的一天的最佳方式是享用热早餐。

waterballoon.en: A balloon, filled with water? What a funny idea.
waterballoon.trans: 气球，塞了水？多么有趣的点子。

wortox_reviver.en: I could not serve this. There is fur on it!
wortox_reviver.trans: 这道菜我端不上桌。上面居然还带着毛！

bodypillow_kelp.en: Wet and unpleasant, like an old spinach salad.
bodypillow_kelp.trans: 湿漉漉、令人不悦，就像一盘放久了的蔬菜沙拉。

mastupgrade_lamp_yotd.en: The petite dragon watches over us.

recharging.en: I don't think it's ready just yet.

generic.en: Maybe I could ask her to make me a kitchen timer...
generic.trans: 也许我可以让她给我做一个厨房定时器……

handpillow_petals.en: Light and airy, like a soufflé.
handpillow_petals.trans: 像蛋奶酥一样轻盈透气。

scanning.en: It seems vaguely potato shaped... or perhaps I'm just hungry.
scanning.trans: 似乎隐约是土豆的形状……也可能我只是饿了。

hunting.en: It seems vaguely potato shaped... or perhaps I'm just hungry.
hunting.trans: 似乎隐约是土豆的形状……也可能我只是饿了。

generic.en: It seems vaguely potato shaped... or perhaps I'm just hungry.
generic.trans: 似乎隐约是土豆的形状……也可能我只是饿了。

generic.en: I wonder what is underneath that?

full.en: Someone else is having their turn in there.

spear_wathgrithr.trans: 我这手还是更适合炒菜的铲子。

ghostlyelixir_attack.en: I'm not sure about some of those ingredients, mademoiselle.
ghostlyelixir_attack.trans: 我对有些配方不是很有信心，小姐。

nightmarepie.en: It's really not as scary as it sounds.
nightmarepie.trans: 并不像听上去那么恐怖。

mutator_water.en: Next time, let's bake something together, non?
mutator_water.trans: 下次我们一起来烘焙，好不好？

rocky.en: Hmm... I would have to be careful to not chip a tooth.
rocky.trans: 唔...我得小心点，不能把牙齿崩掉了。

archive_moon_statue.en: They seemed to think quite highly of the moon.
archive_moon_statue.trans: 这里的人似乎很崇尚月亮。

turf_deciduous.en: It's like an ingredient for the ground.
turf_deciduous.trans: 这就像是一种给地面的调料。

turf_grass.en: Will I need to cut this?

pigking.en: Well, you've got the chops for it.

butter.en: I thought I would never see you again, old friend!
butter.trans: 我还以为再也见不到你了，我的老朋友！

molehill.en: It is a nice hill, but I won't make a mountain of it.
molehill.trans: 这是座不错的小丘，但我是不会把它看作高山的。

monstermeat_dried.trans: 要好好判断一下...能不能吃...

panflute.en: This will be music to something's ears.
panflute.trans: 在某些家伙耳中这是音乐。

lavaarena_battlestandard.en: We must destroy it, tout suite!
lavaarena_battlestandard.trans: 我们必须现在就摧毁它！

chesspiece_deerclops.en: It was much scarier in the flesh.

saltlick_improved.en: This is more than a dash.

lots_of_flowers_blossom.trans: 有什么东西在远方召唤……

dug_marsh_bush.en: Should I bring it back to life?
dug_marsh_bush.trans: 我应该让它再活一次吗？

dock_kit.en: Everything one might need to whip up a dock.

durian_cooked.trans: 可以加点洋葱和红辣椒...

fig.en: You would be delicious in a tart.
fig.trans: 把你做成蛋挞一定会十分美味。

bomb_lunarplant.en: Explosions really add some zest to a fight.
bomb_lunarplant.trans: 爆炸确实能为战斗增添活力。

portableblender_item.en: It has greatly improved my culinary adventures.
portableblender_item.trans: 极大改善了我的美食冒险。

ripe.en: You'd be perfect in a meal!

sleeping.trans: 祝你美梦，可口的小肉肉。

generic.en: Our little friend is not quite ripe.
generic.trans: 我们的小伙伴还不太成熟。

diseasing.en: I think it's coming down with a little something.

withered.en: The heat has stifled these berries.

sculpture_rooknose.en: That doesn't look like a natural rock.

bat.en: If I only had a bat...
bat.trans: 如果我有一根棒球棒该多好...

magician_chest.en: Are you certain that whatever you put in there will come back?
magician_chest.trans: 你确定把东西放进去以后还能拿回来吗？

turnip_cooked.en: It will do in a pinch, but I can do better.
turnip_cooked.trans: 这样也能吃，不过我能做的更好。

buzzard.en: If only you were more turkey than vulture...
buzzard.trans: 如果你更像火鸡而不是秃鹰该有多好...

shadowthrall_mouth.en: It smiles, but is it happy?

purpleamulet.en: I must be crazy to fool around with this.
purpleamulet.trans: 我肯定是疯了才会戴着它。

pepperpopper.en: I like to make my dishes pop!
pepperpopper.trans: 我做的每道菜都火力十足！

walkingplank_yotd.en: That doesn't look safe... but it does look quite nice.
walkingplank_yotd.trans: 看起来不太安全……但样式确实漂亮。

orangeamulet.en: Here one minute, gone the next!

mushroomhat.en: Wearing mushrooms is the next best thing to eating them.
mushroomhat.trans: 把蘑菇戴在头上是除了吃蘑菇以外最棒的事情。

salsa.en: I like to spice things up!

nutrientsgoggleshat.en: I'd best ensure our plants are well fed with the proper nutrients!
nutrientsgoggleshat.trans: 我最好保证我们的植物有充足的养分!

playing.en: Stay out of the nest... and my soup!
playing.trans: 离那个窝和我的汤都远点！

thulecitebugnet.en: I don't mind the taste of bug.

winter_ornamentlight.en: I love seeing the forest lit up at night.
winter_ornamentlight.trans: 我喜欢看森林在晚上亮起来。

boatrace_seastack_throwable_deploykit.en: Where to put it... I wouldn't want anyone to run into it!
boatrace_seastack_throwable_deploykit.trans: 放哪好呢……我可不想让别人碰到它！

lava_pond_rock.en: Looks like a rock to me.

hermit_pearl.en: Madame Pearl entrusted it to me.

tomato.en: Mmm... I can smell the sauces already.
tomato.trans: 嗯，我已经能闻到酱汁的美味了。

pickaxe_lunarplant.en: It's far less delicate than it looks.

wall_moonrock_item.en: I can't believe this was once on the moon.

generic.en: I have mixed feelings about veal.
generic.trans: 我对小牛肉的感情有些复杂。

book_light_upgraded.en: It looks incredibly dense, I thought it'd be more light and airy.
book_light_upgraded.trans: 这本书真密，我以为它会更轻盈和蓬松。

oceanfishinglure_hermit_heavy.en: A heavy dish for a hefty fish, non?
oceanfishinglure_hermit_heavy.trans: 钓大鱼就要用重饵，不是吗？

generic.en: Dogs are nice. I should pay tribute to them.
generic.trans: 狗是好的动物。我们应该致敬它们。

crimson.en: That petit tree doesn't look well at all.
crimson.trans: 那棵小树看起来一点都不健康。

waiting_for_dark.en: I feel as though it's cooking up something...
waiting_for_dark.trans: 我觉得它好像在酝酿着什么……

spawn_disabled.en: I think I'll sleep a bit better now.
spawn_disabled.trans: 我现在会睡得好一点了。

generic.en: Is that broccoli growing inside? Non, it's a tiny tree!
generic.trans: 里面长的是西兰花吗？不是，是一棵小树！

enabled.en: What a lovely and fearsome light!

lavaarena_spawner.en: That's where our foes keep coming from!
lavaarena_spawner.trans: 我们敌人都是从那来的。

sleeping.en: It should make itself a silk pillow.
sleeping.trans: 它应该给自己做一个丝绸枕头。

generic.en: It looks a bit like a rook.
Where there are bees, there is honey!
generic.trans: 有蜜蜂的地方就有蜂蜜！

woby_treat.en: I heard they have unique mouthfeel.
woby_treat.trans: 我听说它的口感独一无二。

multiplayer_portal.en: Is anyone else coming for dinner?

record_worktobedone.en: What a sweet sound it makes.
record_worktobedone.trans: 它发出的声音多么甜美。

potatosack.en: I suppose all that lifting works up quite an appetite.
potatosack.trans: 做完举重运动后食欲会大增吧。

yotc_seedpacket_rare.en: I hope it grows into some tasty ingredients.
yotc_seedpacket_rare.trans: 我希望它能长成可口的原料。

mermwatchtower_regular.trans: 至少他们看起来挺友好！

generic.en: I hope I don't run into any spiders.

bedroll_straw.en: A little better than bare ground. Scratchy.
bedroll_straw.trans: 比幕天席地要好一点。草扎在身上有点痒。

generic.en: Perhaps we could catch something for dinner with this.
generic.trans: 也许我们可以用这个抓点东西吃。

figatoni.en: I've never had pasta so decadent!
figatoni.trans: 我从未吃过如此堕落的意面！

book_light.en: I'm more familiar with au gratin than Latin.
book_light.trans: 拉丁语我不熟，但是肉丁我熟。

lost_toy_42.en: Mon dieu! My hand passes right through it!
lost_toy_42.trans: 我的天啊！我的手直接就穿过去了！

lost_toy_43.en: Mon dieu! My hand passes right through it!
lost_toy_43.trans: 我的天啊！我的手直接就穿过去了！

wobster_sheller_dead.en: One step closer to my mouth.
wobster_sheller_dead.trans: 离成为我的口中餐又近了一步。

armor_voidcloth.en: Will it really keep me safe?
armor_voidcloth.trans: 它真能保护我的安全吗？

marble.en: Would make a nice counter top.
marble.trans: 可以做成不错的厨房台面。

winter_ornamentboss.en: We've earned a moment to celebrate.
winter_ornamentboss.trans: 我们赢得了欢庆的片刻。

waterpump.en: Fires on a ship are not to be taken lightly.
waterpump.trans: 船上发生火灾，不可掉以轻心。

tacklesketch.en: Ah, it looks like a recipe for some fishing tackle.
tacklesketch.trans: 啊，看起来像是某种钓具的配方。

support_pillar.en: I fear it won't be standing much longer.

dirtpile.en: It's making a bit of a mess, isn't it?
dirtpile.trans: 这里有点小混乱，不是吗？

taffy.en: I hope it never dislodges from my teeth!
taffy.trans: 我不想它离开我的牙齿！

justeggs.en: If only I had a bit of cheese, perhaps some chives...
justeggs.trans: 要是再有点奶酪和细香葱就好了……

mast_yotd_item.en: An important ingredient for any sailboat.

generic.trans: 想象一下...肥美多汁的红酒炖鹿肉。

flower_evil.en: A terrible omen if I ever saw one.

mask_foolhat.en: Is it time for a masquerade?
mask_foolhat.trans: 到了假面舞会的时间吗？

cooking_long.en: The flavors need time to meld.

generic.en: What new culinary adventures shall we undertake, old friend?
generic.trans: 老朋友，你说我们应该展开什么新的美食冒险？

empty.en: I would never leave home without it!
empty.trans: 离家在外的时候我必须带着它！

lost_toy_10.en: Mon dieu! My hand passes right through it!
lost_toy_10.trans: 我的天啊！我的手直接就穿过去了！

generic.en: One day I'll find the portal that takes me home...
generic.trans: 总有一天我会找到带我回家的门...

lost_toy_11.en: Mon dieu! My hand passes right through it!
lost_toy_11.trans: 我的天啊！我的手直接就穿过去了！

turf_vent.en: It's like an ingredient for the ground.
turf_vent.trans: 这就像是一种给地面的调料。

lost_toy_14.en: Mon dieu! My hand passes right through it!
lost_toy_14.trans: 我的天啊！我的手直接就穿过去了！

burnt.en: Well, that won't help our explorations much.
burnt.trans: 这对我们的探险不会有太大帮助。

generic.en: I hope my penmanship is legible.
generic.trans: 希望你们能读懂我的笔迹。

twiggy_old.en: That tree looks like it's on its way out.

durian_oversized.en: Oh, that's... quite a lot of durian.

stale.en: It needs a bit more time to stew.
stale.trans: 它需要多一点时间来炖煮。

spoiled.en: It's not my idea of a fine meal, but the plants will love it.
spoiled.trans: 这不是我想要的美食，但植物们会喜欢的。

generic.en: Now to let the ingredients marinade.
generic.trans: 现在来腌制一下食材吧。

mutateddeerclops.en: I never thought I'd miss the way it looked before...
mutateddeerclops.trans: 我从没想过我会想念它以前的样子……

support_pillar_dreadstone.en: I fear it won't be standing much longer.

has_loot.trans: 要不要搜刮一下这个食物储藏室？

generic.en: How delectable! I should chop it down.

empty.en: Was there supposed to be something here?

spidereggsack.en: This is probably a delicacy somewhere.
spidereggsack.trans: 这在某个地方可能是一道美味佳肴。

garlic_seeds.en: What fresh ingredients will grow from these?
garlic_seeds.trans: 能长出什么新鲜的原料呢？

gargoyle_werepig.en: It won't begin to move, will it?

sculpture.trans: 某人真是个有才的艺术家。

empty.en: Just need some stone to get cooking.
empty.trans: 就差一些石头就可以开始做饭了。

has_character.en: There is someone floating in the gelatin.

has_item.en: There is something floating in the gelatin.

lost_toy_18.en: Mon dieu! My hand passes right through it!
lost_toy_18.trans: 我的天啊！我的手直接就穿过去了！

walrus.en: They move faster than you'd think.
walrus.trans: 它们的行动速度比你以为的快。

generic.en: I can't wait to harvest it.

lost_toy_19.en: Mon dieu! My hand passes right through it!
lost_toy_19.trans: 我的天啊！我的手直接就穿过去了！

playing.en: It's all fun and games until someone gets a mouthful of pillow fluff.
playing.trans: 一切都很有趣，直到有人咬得满嘴都是枕头里的绒毛。

generic.en: No one seems to be using it right now.
generic.trans: 现在似乎没有人在使用它。

turf_mosaic_grey.en: It's like an ingredient for the ground.
turf_mosaic_grey.trans: 这就像是一种给地面的调料。

lutefisk.trans: 斯堪的纳维亚半岛传统节庆食物。

monkeyisland_portal_debris.en: These metal bits seem rather out of place.
monkeyisland_portal_debris.trans: 这些金属碎片与这里格格不入。

wx78module_taser.en: They give our metal friend a little extra zest, non?
wx78module_taser.trans: 能给我们的金属朋友带来了一点额外的风味，不是吗？

jellybean.en: A little something sweet to brighten the day.
jellybean.trans: 甜美的小东西，带来明亮的一天。

madscience_lab.en: Chemistry is just fancy cooking, non?
madscience_lab.trans: 化学就是高级烹饪，是不是？

watermelonicle.en: I feel like a kid again!

prime_mate.en: You should teach your crew better manners, monsieur.
prime_mate.trans: 你应该教你的船员更好的礼仪，先生。

miasma.en: It smells of death and disease!

hot.en: Steaming as a method of cooking preserves nutrients and flavor!
hot.trans: 清蒸这种烹饪方法能同时保留营养和风味！

generic.en: I do not wish to wait for what comes out!
generic.trans: 我没想等等看会喷出什么来！

yotb.en: Perhaps I should show it to the judge, to get a measure of his taste.
yotb.trans: 也许我该把它拿给评委看看，了解一下他的品位。

wagpunk_cagewall.en: This will be a private party.

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar.trans: 我想我可能走得太远了……

announce_oceanfishing_linetooloose.en: I should tighten my line a bit.

announce_crafting_fail.en: I am lacking the required ingredients.

announce_healingsalve_acidbuff_done.en: It's time for a second course of Acid Repellent.
announce_healingsalve_acidbuff_done.trans: 是时候享用第二道驱酸剂了。

announce_canfix.en: I believe I could repair that.

announce_wormhole.en: I must be unhinged to travel so...
announce_wormhole.trans: 我一定是疯了才会这样旅行...

spider_warrior.trans: 准备好被收拾吧，讨厌的虫子！

spider.en: I hope it does not rain after I kill you!
spider.trans: 希望我除掉你后，天不会下雨！

generic.trans: 我还是一个熟练的屠夫！

pig.en: No part of you will go to waste, cochon!
pig.trans: 你这只猪，你身上的任何部位都不会浪费！

announce_fan_out.en: It fell apart in my hands!

announce_weight_heavy.en:
Weight: {weight}
Enough fish to feed an entire crew!
announce_weight_heavy.trans:
重量: {weight}
这么多鱼都够喂饱一船人了!

announce_otterboat_outofshallows.en: Zut, going this far out to sea was a recipe for disaster.
announce_otterboat_outofshallows.trans: 啊啧！出海这么远是在酝酿着灾难啊。

describe_plantstressornutrients.en: Some fresh nutrients might be just the thing to perk it up.
describe_plantstressornutrients.trans: 给一些新鲜的营养物质也许能让它振作起来。

announce_nosleephaspermanentlight.en: I can still see the light from our metal friend when I close my eyes...
announce_nosleephaspermanentlight.trans: 就算闭上眼，我还是可以看到我们的金属朋友发出的光……

announce_mount_lowhealth.en: My poor sirloin's not looking so good!
announce_mount_lowhealth.trans: 我可怜的西冷看起来不太好！

3.en: The earth must be very hungry.

announce_wortox_reviver_failteleport.en: Wherever I go, here I am.
announce_wortox_reviver_failteleport.trans: 无论去到哪里，自己还是那个自己。

describe_plantverystressed.en: This is a very troubled plant.
describe_plantverystressed.trans: 这株植物思想负担很重啊。

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_time_almost_.en: The game will be finished soon.

announce_cant_escape_curse.en: What is this? It keeps returning to me!
announce_cant_escape_curse.trans: 这是什么？它怎么挥之不去！

announce_yotd_noboats.en: I seem to have drifted a bit too far from the starting point.
announce_yotd_noboats.trans: 我似乎偏离出发点过头了。

quagmire_announce_mealburnt.en: I should have taken that off sooner.

announce_nodaysleep.en: It is too bright to sleep.

announce_detach_buff_playerabsorption.en: Ah... I've gone from tough to tender.
announce_detach_buff_playerabsorption.trans: 啊...我已经从强硬变得温柔。

announce_archive_old_knowledge.en: I believe I already knew that one.

announce_detach_buff_moistureimmunity.en: Is it getting a bit soggy in here?

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar_retur.en: Hmm, they should be around here somewhere...
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar_retur.trans: 嗯，他们应该就在这附近……

announce_hunt_start_fork.en: Oh my... that trail looks a bit dangerous for my taste...
announce_hunt_start_fork.trans: 噢，天啊……那条踪迹太危险，不合我的口味……

announce_archive_no_power.en: If only there was a way to get it working again...
announce_archive_no_power.trans: 要是有办法让它重新运作就好了……

announce_monkey_curse_change.en: Mon dieu, I've become a monkey!
announce_monkey_curse_change.trans: 我的天啊，我变成猴子了！

announce_soaked.en: I'm wetter than a dish rag!

announce_prefallinvoid.en: It is not the fall that kills you...

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_losegame.en: Well, I suppose I'll just have to do better next time.
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_losegame.trans: 好吧，看来只好下次做得更好了。

announce_moonpotion_failed.en: Perhaps that is for the best.

announce_detach_buff_attack.en: Erm... I think I'm more of a food lover than a fighter after all.
announce_detach_buff_attack.trans: 啊...我是美食爱好者，不是战士。

announce_scrapbook_full.en: My scrapbook is already filled to the brim.
announce_scrapbook_full.trans: 我的图鉴已经被塞得满满当当了。

announce_nomountedgift.en: First I should get down from this big sirloin here.
announce_nomountedgift.trans: 我得先从这个大西冷上下来。

announce_yotd_nocheckpoints.en: Ah! There is no race without checkpoints!
announce_yotd_nocheckpoints.trans: 啊！没有检查点根本没法比赛啊！

announce_hermitcrab_shell_arrive.en: I have arrived at Madame Pearl's!
announce_hermitcrab_shell_arrive.trans: 这就到了珍珠女士的府邸！

announce_petrifed_trees.en: Are the trees making that sound?

announce_attach_buff_electricattack.en: I'll zap you to a nice, even crisp!

announce_archive_new_knowledge.en: Oh! It's teaching me a new recipe for a machine!
announce_archive_new_knowledge.trans: 哦！它在教我怎么制作新机器！

announce_monkey_curse_changeback.en: I don't think I'll be cooking with bananas for a while...
announce_monkey_curse_changeback.trans: 今后很长一段时间，我都不会做香蕉料理了……

no_station.en: If I had a station with the right tools I could cook that right up...
no_station.trans: 如果有工作站和对应的工具，我几下就能出锅。

no_ingredients.en: Ah non, I'm missing some ingredients!

no_tech.en: I don't know the recipe for that one yet.
no_tech.trans: 我还没弄明白那个菜谱。

describe_smoldering.en: I fear that that is about to cook itself.
describe_smoldering.trans: 我怕那东西要把自己给烹饪了。

announce_monkey_curse_1.en: I'm beginning to feel a bit unwell...
announce_monkey_curse_1.trans: 我开始觉得有点不舒服……

announce_pick_disease_warning.en: It has a most un-delicious smell.
announce_pick_disease_warning.trans: 它有一股很不美味的味道。

describe_plantstressorfamily.en: I think it needs some company.

announce_foodmemory.en: I'd rather not eat the same old thing again.
announce_foodmemory.trans: 我不想吃同样的旧东西。

announce_winters_feast_buff.en: Mon dieu, my world is aglow!
announce_winters_feast_buff.trans: 我的天啊，我的世界在发光！

announce_ticoon_nothing_to_track.en: Perhaps there are no petits chats around to track.

announce_oceanfishing_gotaway.en: You have escaped my crockpot for now, mon ami.
announce_oceanfishing_gotaway.trans: 你暂时逃过了我的锅，我的朋友。

announce_attach_buff_attack.en: Try my new specialty - an open-faced knuckle sandwich!
announce_attach_buff_attack.trans: 试试我的新特色菜-打脸指关节三明治！

describe_plantstressorseason.en: Hm... this one might not be in season.
describe_plantstressorseason.trans: 嗯……这个可能已经过季了。

announce_deerclops.en: I do not like that sound one bit!
announce_deerclops.trans: 我一点也不喜欢那声音！

announce_rabbitking_lucky.en: That is a rare rabbit, indeed!
announce_rabbitking_lucky.trans: 这确实是一只罕见的兔子！

announce_charlie_attack.en: Gah! I do believe something bit me!
announce_charlie_attack.trans: 啊！我敢肯定有东西咬了我！

announce_hunt_avoid_fork.en: This trail might be safer, non?
announce_hunt_avoid_fork.trans: 这条踪迹更安全，不是吗？

announce_boat_sink.en: I don't want to be brined!

announce_ticoon_start_tracking.en: Allons-y, monsieur! I'll be close behind.
announce_ticoon_start_tracking.trans: 出发吧，先生！我会紧跟在后面。

announce_yotd_notenoughboats.en: Perhaps I should make a little space, in case someone wants to drop in.
announce_yotd_notenoughboats.trans: 也许我应该腾出一点地方，万一有人想进来呢。

announce_adventurefail.en: I shall have to attempt that again.

announce_rabbitking_passive.en: I hear a gentle rustling beneath our feet.
announce_rabbitking_passive.trans: 我听到脚下有轻微的沙沙声。

1.en: I should like to head for the surface now!

2.en: I think it's about time we left!

3.en: Time to pack up and go.

announce_kitcoon_hideandseek_join.en: Might I join in, s'il vous plait?

announce_ticoon_dead.en: Oh my, that must have been his ninth life...
announce_ticoon_dead.trans: 嗷，天啊，那一定是他的第9条命……

announce_accomplishment_done.en: I hope this feeling lasts forever...
announce_accomplishment_done.trans: 我希望这种感觉持续到永远...

raw.en: Blech. Completely lacking in every way.

yucky.en: I'm frankly offended by the mere suggestion.
yucky.trans: 光提议都是对我的侮辱。

spoiled.en: Blech! Why did I allow that to cross my lips?
spoiled.trans: 呸！我怎么会吃下这种东西的？

same_old_1.trans: 我希望食物的口味丰富点。

same_old_3.en: I want to eat something different.

stale.en: That was past its best-by date...
stale.trans: 这东西过了最佳食用日期...

announce_ticoon_lost_kitcoon.en: Ah, he seems to have lost the trail.

announce_eyeofterror_flyback.en: Ah, it's back! Not going out without a fight, it seems.
announce_eyeofterror_flyback.trans: 啊，它回来了！看来它不打一架誓不罢休。

announce_off_script.en: Everyone wants to add their own flavor to a role.
announce_off_script.trans: 人们都想为角色加入自己的味道。

announce_nopumpkincarvingonfire.en: You were too beautiful for this world.
announce_nopumpkincarvingonfire.trans: 你太美丽，这个世界不适合你。

announce_nohungersiesta.en: I could use a nice meal first.
announce_nohungersiesta.trans: 我需要先吃点像样的东西。

2.en: May you grow big, ripe and delicious.
2.trans: 愿你长得又大又熟又好吃。

3.en: My, you look fresh as a daisy today mon ami!
3.trans: 我的天，你今天看起来像雏菊一样清新，我的朋友!

4.en: What a good little plant you are.

5.en: How are you today, mon ami? Everything growing well?
5.trans: 我的朋友，你今天好吗？事情都顺利吗？

announce_hunt_lost_trail_spring.en: The trail has been washed out.

announce_ticoon_get_leader_attention.en: Oh! Do you smell something, monsieur?
announce_ticoon_get_leader_attention.trans: 噢！你闻到了什么吗，先生？

idol_med.en: Something looks to be trapped inside.

seed_med.en: Something looks to be trapped inside.

glass_med.en: Something looks to be trapped inside.

announce_wetter.en: I fear I may be water soluble!
announce_wetter.trans: 我害怕自己会被水溶解掉！

announce_nodangergift.en: I would like to not die first.

announce_otterboat_denbroken.trans: 没有了餐桌摆件，它摇摇欲坠！

describe_plantstressormoisture.en: Would you care for a drink of water?

announce_nodangersleep.en: In this particular instance I'd prefer not to die in my sleep!
announce_nodangersleep.trans: 在这样的特殊情况下，我才不想在睡梦中死去！
